Introduction.en: Zoybean Pods grow from sprouts to full pods, then split open to release helpful plant "zomboids" which attack zombies.
Introduction.zh: 豆腐尸荚生长成为硕大的豆荚，并释放一只“豆腐僵尸”为你战斗。

DESCRIPTION.en: 30 (basic), 35 (carrothead), 15 (melonhead)
summons a Zomboid Gargantuar with 3600HP

Chat.en: "Developing plant zomboids in eerie mimicry of zombie life is well within the boundaries of human experience," Zoybean Pod insists with a calm, unvarying steadiness.
Chat.zh: “以诡异的方式模仿僵尸生命来培育豆腐僵尸，这其实完全在人们经验的范畴之内。”豆腐尸荚坚持道，语气带着一种平静而恒定的沉稳。

BriefIntroduction.en: Grows helpful zomboids
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生成为我们战斗的豆腐僵尸

Introduction.en: Zoybean Pods slowly sprout to full pods, then release plant "zomboids" that creep slowly and act as defensive tanks.
Introduction.zh: 豆腐尸荚生长成为硕大的豆荚，并释放一只“豆腐僵尸”为你战斗。

DESCRIPTION.en: wall-like zomboids don't deal damage
summons a Zomboid Gargantuar with 3600HP

Chat.en: "Developing plant zomboids in eerie mimicry of zombie life is well within the boundaries of human experience," Zoybean Pod insists with a calm, unvarying steadiness.
Chat.zh: “以诡异的方式模仿僵尸生命来培育豆腐僵尸，这其实完全在人们经验的范畴之内。”豆腐尸荚坚持道，语气带着一种平静而恒定的沉稳。

BriefIntroduction.en: Grows helpful zomboids
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生成为我们战斗的豆腐僵尸

Introduction.en: Zoybean Pods slowly grow from sprouts to pods, spawning ranged plant "zombunters" that chuck damaging tofu. It can spawn both regular zombunters, as well as stationary "zombunter elites" that lob chilling tofus.
Introduction.zh: 豆腐尸荚生长成为硕大的豆荚，并释放一只“豆腐僵尸”为你战斗。

DESCRIPTION.en: 80 (regular), 20 (elite)
every tile (regular), 4.5-5s (elite)
elites target the rightmost zombie in their lane, and deal chill for 10s
zombunters stop firing and deal much less bite damage at closer-range (50 DPS)
summons a Zomboid Gargantuar with 3600HP

Chat.en: "Developing plant zomboids in eerie mimicry of zombie life is well within the boundaries of human experience," Zoybean Pod insists with a calm, unvarying steadiness.
Chat.zh: “以诡异的方式模仿僵尸生命来培育豆腐僵尸，这其实完全在人们经验的范畴之内。”豆腐尸荚坚持道，语气带着一种平静而恒定的沉稳。

BriefIntroduction.en: Grows helpful zomboids
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生成为我们战斗的豆腐僵尸

Introduction.en: Ampthuriums fire lightning bolts at zombies, absorb electric charges from surrounding plants, and turns those charges into powerful electricity orbs.
Introduction.zh: 电离红掌向僵尸发射球状闪电，并且能吸收周围植物身上的电荷。

DESCRIPTION.en: lightning bolts fired after absorbing charges deals heavy damage
DESCRIPTION.zh: 吸收电荷后发射的球状电伤害更高

DESCRIPTION.en: orbs stun in a half-tile area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 光球会使半格范围内的目标眩晕。

DESCRIPTION.en: Strikes groups of zombies with thunder for 1200 damage, with the strikes increasing with the number of plants charged

Chat.en: Don't be surprised by Ampthurium's ability to neutralize positive and negative charges, just look at the brothers' physics exam papers with flying colours and you will understand. Yet, they rarely understand each other's thoughts, such as which colored tie to wear; whether to watch a documentary or a TV show; and whether to eat at home or go out for food. Though, they know that without each other, neither could be a talent in wielding lightning.
Chat.zh: 不要为电离红掌中和正负电荷的能力而感到惊讶，看看兄弟俩全部都是满分的物理试卷你就明白了。但是它俩却始终无法理解对方的想法，比如在选择戴什么颜色的领带、在看纪录片还是电视剧、在去印度餐厅还是中餐厅约会这样的问题上。不过他们也明白，缺了对方，他们谁也不是操纵闪电的天才。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fire lightning bolts and absorbs electric charges
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射球状电并吸收电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: orbs stun in a half-tile area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 光球会使半格范围内的目标眩晕。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fire lightning bolts and absorbs electric charges
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射球状电并吸收电荷

Introduction.en: Ampthuriums fire splitting lightning orbs at zombies, absorb electric charges from surrounding plants, and turns those charges into powerful electricity orbs.
Introduction.zh: 电离红掌向僵尸发射球状闪电，并且能吸收周围植物身上的电荷。

DESCRIPTION.en: lightning bolts fired after absorbing charges deals heavy damage
DESCRIPTION.zh: 吸收电荷后发射的球状电伤害更高

DESCRIPTION.en: orbs stun in a half-tile area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 光球会使半格范围内的目标眩晕。

DESCRIPTION.en: lightning orbs split into 5 smaller electric orbs, dealing damage all the while
DESCRIPTION.zh: 光球会使半格范围内的目标眩晕。

DESCRIPTION.en: Strikes groups of zombies with thunder for 1800 damage, with the strikes increasing with the number of plants charged

Chat.en: Don't be surprised by Ampthurium's ability to neutralize positive and negative charges, just look at the brothers' physics exam papers with flying colours and you will understand. Yet, they rarely understand each other's thoughts, such as which colored tie to wear; whether to watch a documentary or a TV show; and whether to eat at home or go out for food. Though, they know that without each other, neither could be a talent in wielding lightning.
Chat.zh: 不要为电离红掌中和正负电荷的能力而感到惊讶，看看兄弟俩全部都是满分的物理试卷你就明白了。但是它俩却始终无法理解对方的想法，比如在选择戴什么颜色的领带、在看纪录片还是电视剧、在去印度餐厅还是中餐厅约会这样的问题上。不过他们也明白，缺了对方，他们谁也不是操纵闪电的天才。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fire lightning bolts and absorbs electric charges
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射球状电并吸收电荷

Introduction.en: Aceparagus Fighters shoot down zombies in three lanes.
Introduction.zh: 芦笋战机可以攻击前方及相邻两行的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: must reload for a 7s when finishing 6 shots
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射 6 次后必须重新装填一会。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots strong bullets down 3 lanes for 1200 damage

Chat.en: Aceparagus Fighter seems to enjoy the prestigious reputation of being the "King of Vegetables", yet he takes no pride in this. Having loved studying all kinds of firearms and aerodynamics since a young seedling, he can only realize his value on the battlefield when confronting the zombies. "I don't want to be recognized for what I am, but only for how I fight!"
Chat.zh: 芦笋享有“蔬菜之王”的美称，然而它却并不以此为傲。从小热爱研究各类热兵器的它只有在战场上才能实现自己的价值。“我只希望大家能够记住战场上热血的我！”芦笋认真地说道。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots bullets at zombies in three lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向三行的僵尸发射子弹

Introduction.en: Pineapples block off zombies, and spin to reflect straightforward hostile projectiles.
Introduction.zh: 旋转菠萝可以阻挡僵尸前进, 并通过旋转自身反弹敌人的子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: can deflect any straightforward zombie projectiles, as well as lobbed shots
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使用叶绿素时能吸引子弹

DESCRIPTION.en: Attracts all zombie projectiles on the lawn and deflects them for 10s

Chat.en: Others often ponder the way Spinappple deals with his problems, "Is it because of the elasticity of your body rather than your spinning that make the bullets reflected?" He replied about that, "I just like spinning, which relaxes my spinning leaves."
Chat.zh: 时常有人怀疑旋转菠萝处理问题的方式，“子弹会不会只是通过你身体的弹性反弹，而不是你的旋转呢？”对此，他表示道：“我只是喜欢旋转，这样能让我头顶的叶片放松很多。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Blocks off zombies and reflect straightforward projectiles
BriefIntroduction.zh: 抵挡僵尸并反弹子弹

Introduction.en: Ice Blooms freeze, chill, and deal chip damage to all zombies on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 寒冰蓓蕾冻结、减速，并伤害全屏的僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
turns 3 of the most dangerous zombies into ice sculptures, obstructing other zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使场内几名较危险的僵尸变为冰雕，使之阻碍其他僵尸前进

DESCRIPTION.en: zombies are chilled after thawing for 10s
DESCRIPTION.zh: 僵尸解冻后10秒内会感到寒冷。

Chat.en: "The last time Ice Bloom had pancakes for breakfast, she wasn't satisfied. She can't say why, exactly, but there was something subtly wrong with them. The shocking reason? Substandard maple syrup."
Chat.zh: “上次寒冰蓓蕾早餐吃煎饼，她不是很满意，但又说不出为什么，但是那些煎饼确实有些不对劲。结果你知道为什么？加了劣质枫糖浆。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Freezes and damages zombies, turning some of which into ice sculptures
BriefIntroduction.zh: 冰冻并伤害僵尸，将其中几名僵尸变作冰雕

Introduction.en: Chip-lings are immature plant seedlings that deal chip damage in a 1x1 area on contact
Introduction.zh: 寒冰蓓蕾冻结、减速，并伤害全屏的僵尸，尤其是 3x3 范围内的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
contact
Transforms into an Imitater, which further turns into a random plant

Chat.en: Many of Chip-ling's plant friends have always pondered why Chip-ling never wants to grow up. The obvious would be a higher sun cost, but Chip-ling denies that. Turned out, their plant guardians used to read them stories about Peater Plant, who also stayed a seedling. You have to be careful for what you wish for, though.
Chat.zh: “上次寒冰蓓蕾早餐吃煎饼，她不是很满意，但又说不出为什么，但是那些煎饼确实有些不对劲。结果你知道为什么？加了劣质枫糖浆。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Deals chip damage in a small area upon contact
BriefIntroduction.zh: 接触时会在小范围内造成芯片损坏

Introduction.en: Seashooters are amphibious pea plants that can shoot sea-peas with splash. Their firing pattern can vary based on where they're planted.
Introduction.zh: 海豌豆是两栖植物，在水中时可以向三个方向发射。

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots 3 sea-peas in its lane
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在其车道上射出 3 颗海豌豆

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots sea-peas in different angles varying on the location of the zombie it is targeting.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 它会根据目标僵尸的位置，以不同的角度发射海豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: sea-peas extingush flames
Sprays 125 sea-peas all across the lawn, for 30 damage per pea

Chat.en: As a former lifeguard, Seashooter has taken their swimming skills to the next level and have decided to teach young seedlings and saplings how to swim (but to no avail, so Lily Pad took over). "We learned it the hard way!"
Chat.zh: “作为一名前救生员，海豌豆将自己的游泳技能提升到了一个新的高度，并决定教小苗子们游泳（但毫无成效）。“我们可是吃过苦头才学会的！””

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots sea-peas across 3 different directions in water, shoots 3 sea-peas in its lane on land.
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在水中向 3 个不同方向发射海豌豆，在陆地上沿其所在路线发射 3 个海豌豆。

Introduction.en: Gold Blooms produce a burst of sun all at once.
Introduction.zh: 黄金蓓蕾一次性爆射出大量阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: "Your botanists were so preoccupied with whether they could," says Gold Bloom, about nothing and to nobody in particular, "they didn't stop to think if they should."
Chat.zh: “你们的植物学家一心只想着能不能做到,”黄金蓓蕾说,他表示自己不针对任何人和事,“他们没有停下来思考是否有这么做的必要。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Produces a burst of sun all at once
BriefIntroduction.zh: 一次性爆射出大量阳光

Introduction.en: Twin Sunflowers give twice as much sun as a normal sunflower.
Introduction.zh: 双胞向日葵提供向日葵两倍的阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: double
Instantly produces 250 sun

Chat.en: Twin Sunflower's super-chic line of ultra-expensive quality sunglasses has been a huge hit wherever she goes. Due to this she has been unable to travel ANYWHERE without being swarmed by the Poppyrazzi.
Chat.zh: 双胞向日葵那副超级时尚又无比昂贵的墨镜让她不论在哪都像个大明星。因此她不论去到哪里都会被“枸籽队”簇拥。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gives twice as much as a sunflower
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生产比向日葵更多的阳光

Introduction.en: Sun-shrooms give small suns at first, then normal suns, and finally large suns.
Introduction.zh: 阳光菇一开始提供小阳光，然后提供普通阳光，最后提供大阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly grows to its full stage and produces 225 sun

Chat.en: Oh sure, Sun-shroom is pretty well-known for his ever-present grin and sunny disposition. But truth be told, even he has his dark days. It ain't easy keeping things light when you live in the shadow.
Chat.zh: 哦当然，阳光菇的性格可常常是出了名的积极阳光。但是实话说，即使是他也有不顺心的日子。生活在黑暗之中还能一直保持阳光可不是件容易的事。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gives more sun over time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 随着生长产出更多的阳光

Introduction.en: Lily Pads let you plant non-aquatic plants on top of them.
Introduction.zh: 你可以种植非水生植物在莲叶上

DESCRIPTION.en: can also be planted under non-aquatic plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 也可以种植在非水生植物的下方

DESCRIPTION.en: Creates clones around itself in a cross shape

Chat.en: Not many people know this, but Lily Pad absolutely loves square dancing. There he is, a circular plant gliding across the dance floor making squares. He loves how it pushes his boundaries and really makes him outside the sphere.
Chat.zh: 没多少人知道，莲叶真的很喜欢跳方块舞，我是指，在一个方块里跳舞。你看他又开始了，那株圆形的植物在方格舞池上滑行，把他自己变成方形。他很喜欢被方框压着边缘的感觉，能让他感到脱离了“单调的圈子”。

BriefIntroduction.en: Let you plant non-aquatic plants on top of it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 允许在水面上种植非两栖植物

Introduction.en: Shooting Starfruits shoot stars in 5 lanes.
Introduction.zh: 流星果会沿着五个行发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of stars in all 5 lanes, with larger, stronger stars shot periodically for 400 damage and 200 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: When you see a Shooting Starfruit, make a wish, any wish! Any wish that involves takin' down zombies, that is.
Chat.zh: 当你遇见一只流星果，许愿，任何愿望！只要是关于打倒僵尸的愿望，他都会为你实现的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots stars along all 5 lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 沿五行发射星星

Introduction.en: Shooting Starfruits shoot big stars down all 5 lanes.
Introduction.zh: 流星果会沿着五个行发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of stars in all 5 lanes, with larger, stronger stars shot periodically for 400 damage and 200 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: When you see a Shooting Starfruit, make a wish, any wish! Any wish that involves takin' down zombies, that is.
Chat.zh: 当你遇见一只流星果，许愿，任何愿望！只要是关于打倒僵尸的愿望，他都会为你实现的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots big stars along all 5 lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 沿五行发射星星

Introduction.en: Shooting Starfruits shoot stars in 5 lanes that break into smaller ones upon hitting zombies.
Introduction.zh: 流星果会沿着五个行发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of stars in all 5 lanes, with larger, stronger stars shot periodically for 400 damage and 200 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: When you see a Shooting Starfruit, make a wish, any wish! Any wish that involves takin' down zombies, that is.
Chat.zh: 当你遇见一只流星果，许愿，任何愿望！只要是关于打倒僵尸的愿望，他都会为你实现的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots 5 stars that break into smaller ones along the lanes at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 沿五行发射星星

Introduction.en: Starfruits shoot stars in 5 directions.
Introduction.zh: 星星果会向五个方向发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Launches 30 massive stars in 5 directions for 200 damage per star

Chat.en: Just a small town fruit that travelled to the big city and found his way to the future. His favorite modes of transportation: conveyor belts, hoverboards, and rockets. WEEEEE!
Chat.zh: 只是一只乡下来的小小的水果，四处游荡，到了大城市，甚至找到了通向未来的路。他最喜欢的交通方式是：传送带、悬浮滑板，还有火箭。哇呼呼呼呼！

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots stars in 5 directions
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向五个方向发射星星

Introduction.en: Angel Starfruits adjust their angles then shoot stars in 5 directions.
Introduction.zh: 天使星星果会调整角度，随后向五个方向发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: changes its shooting direction according to zombies' coordinates
DESCRIPTION.zh: 它会根据僵尸的坐标改变射击方向

DESCRIPTION.en: Launches 20 damaging stars across all directions for 200 damage per pink star

Chat.en: Princess Angel Starfruit is far more energetic than Starfruit from a small town. Starfruit can't even be bothered to rotate himself a little.
Chat.zh: 天使星星果公主比来自乡下的星星果有活力多了，星星果甚至连转个身都不愿意。

BriefIntroduction.en: Adjusts the angle and shoots stars in 5 directions
BriefIntroduction.zh: 调整角度并向五个方向发射星星

Introduction.en: Sea-starfruits constantly shoot stars in 10 directions.
Introduction.zh: 天使星星果会调整角度，随后向五个方向发射星星子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: constantly shoots even if there are no zombies nearby
DESCRIPTION.zh: 它会根据僵尸的坐标改变射击方向

DESCRIPTION.en: can only be planted in water
DESCRIPTION.zh: 它会根据僵尸的坐标改变射击方向

DESCRIPTION.en: Launches 20 damaging stars across all directions for 200 damage per pink star

Chat.en: Why would Sea-starfruit shoot 10 stars if she only have 5 rays? Well, everyone knows except Shooting Starfruit, whom Sea-starfruit absolutely hates. "He's nearly a celestial object, how come I can shoot so many yet he can't? Pure laziness."
Chat.zh: 天使星星果公主比来自乡下的星星果有活力多了，星星果甚至连转个身都不愿意。

BriefIntroduction.en: Constantly shoots stars in all directions
BriefIntroduction.zh: 调整角度并向五个方向发射星星

Introduction.en: Homing Thistles fire seeking shots at targets that are the closest to home.
Introduction.zh: 导向蓟会向离家最近的目标发射追踪子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Spins out 20 glowing, seeking shots for 240 damage each

Chat.en: Don't even think about trying to pull one over on Homing Thistle. He's got a bead on you. He sees right through your facade. It's like he has a missile... aimed at your soul.
Chat.zh: 别想着能欺骗导向蓟。他能一眼把你看穿，穿过你表露的假象，像是一道雷射光，精准地瞄着你的灵魂！

BriefIntroduction.en: Attacks farthest left target in any lane
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向场地最左侧目标发动攻击

Introduction.en: Rotobagas shoot projectiles along the four diagonals, in each direction that has a target.
Introduction.zh: 旋转芜菁向四个对角方向发射子弹

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of 60 rutubagas in an 'X' shape for 35 damage each

Chat.en: Sometimes Rotobaga hears the other plants gossiping about each other. "Did you notice that so-and-so has been putting on weight?" they might say. Or, "I hear that so-and-so is dating so-and-so. Can you believe it?" But Rotobaga isn't the kind of plant to engage in idle gossiping. She's not interested in talking about anyone behind their leaves. She does her best to rise above it.
Chat.zh: 有时候旋转芜菁会听到其他植物说别人闲话。比如说，“你发现那个谁谁谁又增重了吗？”又比如，“我听说谁谁谁和谁谁谁约上了呢。你能相信嘛？哈哈。”但是旋转芜菁不是那种喜欢参与闲聊的植物，她对在别人叶后说闲话不感兴趣。因此她总是尽可能“上升”到别的话题。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots along the diagonal, up to four directions at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向四个对角方向发射子弹

Introduction.en: Primal Peashooters shoot heavy peas that knockback zombies. Zombies that can't be knockbacked are stunned.
Introduction.zh: 原始豌豆射手发射沉重的大豌豆，对僵尸造成短暂的眩晕。

DESCRIPTION.en: primal peas shoot heavy peas that knock zombies back
DESCRIPTION.zh: 沉重的豌豆有时能击退僵尸一段距离

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots 8 rock peas at a fast rate for 300 damage each

Chat.en: Primal Peashooter may be primitive, but that doesn't stop him from enrolling and excelling in several software development correspondence courses.
Chat.zh: 尽管原始豌豆可能很原始，但是他仍然能涉猎并精通好几门软件开发的相关课程。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots heavy knockbacking peas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射重型豌豆

Introduction.en: Tumbleweeds roar off down the lane, bouncing off zombies and knocking them and stuns them.
Introduction.zh: 滚草沿着小路呼啸而下，撞击僵尸，将它们击倒并使其眩晕。

DESCRIPTION.en: knocks back zombies and stuns

Chat.en: This zesty little guy can't wait to get at it! Places to do! Things to go! It works because he planned thoroughly ahead of time.
Chat.zh: unreleased

BriefIntroduction.en: Bounces between lanes and knocks zombies back
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在赛道间弹跳并击退僵尸

Introduction.en: Threepeaters shoot peas in three lanes.
Introduction.zh: 三线射手向三行发射豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: three lanes
Sprays 60 peas across the lawn

Chat.en: Threepeater loves playing multiplayer in video games, but split-screen never works out because the left head always cheats.
Chat.zh: 三线射手喜欢在电子游戏中玩多人模式，但是就算分成三个屏幕也没有用，左边那个家伙总喜欢作弊偷看。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots three peas in three lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向三行发射豌豆

Introduction.en: Fire Peashooters shoot flaming peas down the lane.
Introduction.zh: 火焰豌豆向本行发射火焰豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: has a ~30% to shoot a plasma pea every shot
DESCRIPTION.zh: 每次射击有大约 30% 的几率发射等离子豌豆

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches the lane with fire for 80 damage per hit

Chat.en: Fire Peashooter knows that what she does looks exciting. But working with an open flame is serious and, more importantly, dangerous business. That's why, in her spare time, she talks to young seedlings about the importance of fire safety. "I'm a trained professional," she explains. "Don't try this at home, kids."
Chat.zh: 火焰豌豆射手很清楚她看上去多么的酷炫。但是身上燃着火焰战斗是一件十分严肃，而且关键是很危险的行为。因此，在她闲时经常告诫孩子们关于消防安全的事情。“我是接受过训练的，非常专业，”她解释道，“千万不要在家自己尝试，孩子们。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots flaming peas and warms nearby plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射火焰豌豆，并冰释身边的植物

Introduction.en: Floawer Pots let you plant un-flyable plants on top of them.
Introduction.zh: 飞天花盆允许你在天上或潮水上种植不会飞的植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: carries plants that aren't able to fly
Click on it to move between different places when not carrying a plant. Also gains more toughness (1200)

Chat.en: Floawer Pot is actually from the future for sure, but not from your roof in the past. "You asked why? Feed me a Plant Food, I'd tell ya! " He says.
Chat.zh: 飞天花盆实际上当然来自未来，而不是从以前你家的屋顶上。“你问为什么？喂我一颗叶绿素我就告诉你！”他说。

BriefIntroduction.en: Allows un-flyable plants to be planted in sky
BriefIntroduction.zh: 可以在空中种植不能飞行的植物

Introduction.en: Pea Vines planted on top of Appease-mint Family plants provide a significant damage boost to those plants.
Introduction.zh: 为豌豆家族植物套上豌豆藤蔓，他们会得到显著的伤害增益。

DESCRIPTION.en: boosts Appease-mint Family plants
Shoots a barrage 45 peas for 30 damage per pea

Chat.en: Pea Vine boosts Appease-mint Family plants, and he himself is an Appease-mint Family plant, so therefore... hang on... don't tell me... I can do this. I said DON'T TELL ME.
Chat.zh: 豌豆藤蔓加强豌豆家族植物，而他自己也是豌豆家族的植物，所以……因此……等等……先别告诉我……我记得是啥！我说了不要告诉我！

BriefIntroduction.en: Boosts Appease-mint plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 加强本格的豌豆类植物和豌豆家族植物

Introduction.en: Pumpkins can be planted on top of other plants to provide a tough additional layer of armour.
Introduction.zh: 南瓜头可以被种植在其他植物的身上，作为保护他们的铠甲。

DESCRIPTION.en: Gains armour around itself for 4000 extra toughness

Chat.en: Pumpkin may be a hollowed-out shell, but he still has a rich inner life filled with feelings, fantasies and suprisingly disappointing opinions.
Chat.zh: 南瓜头可能只是一颗被掏空的南瓜壳，但是他的内心仍然充满了感情、幻想以及让人非常失望的各种点子。

BriefIntroduction.en: Surrounds and protects
BriefIntroduction.zh: 保护本格的其他植物

Introduction.en: Grave Busters consume graves they're planted on.
Introduction.zh: 将噬碑藤种在墓碑上，他们会啃食掉这块墓碑。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, must be planted on graves
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，必须种植在墓碑上

DESCRIPTION.en: can also consume surfboards, tents, backpacks, arcade cabinets, and weapon stands

Chat.en: He may appear spiky, reserved or ill-tempered, but Grave Buster just wants to give you a big hug. Unless you're a puppy. He's terrified of those.
Chat.zh: 他可能看上去凶巴巴坏脾气，但是噬碑藤只是想要给你一个大大的拥抱。除非你是一只小狗，他很害怕小狗！

BriefIntroduction.en: Plant it on a grave or other grid item to bust it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 种植在墓碑上并移除这块墓碑

Introduction.en: Fume-shrooms shoot fumes that damage all zombies in an .
Introduction.zh: 大喷菇向范围内所有僵尸发射气泡攻击。

DESCRIPTION.en: Unleashes a giant burst of fumes that deal 800 DPS and pushes zombies back

Chat.en: "I think of myself as a pretty confident shroom and an all-around fungi,"says Fume-shroom."But sometimes, when I'm eating Plant Food, I hear them chuckling. I hear them calling me 'Balloon-shroom' and saying that it even rhymes. I don't think they know how much that hurts."
Chat.zh: “我觉得自己是一只很自信而且全能型的大蘑菇，”大喷菇说，“但是有时候我释放叶绿素效果时听到别人偷笑，说我是‘气球菇’……我猜他们根本不知道这话多么伤人。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots fumes that can damage all zombies in an area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向范围内的所有僵尸发射气泡攻击

Introduction.en: A timid shroom that shoots hard-hitting spore projectiles at zombies in its lane, but hides when they get too close.
Introduction.zh: 向僵尸发射孢子的胆小的蘑菇，当僵尸靠近身边时躲避起来。

DESCRIPTION.en: stops attacking when zombies appears around
DESCRIPTION.zh: 有僵尸在附近时停止攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: Triggers the Plantfood effects of all Scaredy-Shrooms surrounding it, shooting a barrage of 65 knockbacking spores for 40 damage per spore

Chat.en: "How did I get talked into this? I wish I was at home."
Chat.zh: “我当初为什么会被说服站在这里？我现在只想回家啊！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots spore projectiles at the zombies, but hides when they get too close
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸发射子弹，但是当僵尸靠近时躲避

Introduction.en: Commando Peas fire 4 peas at one time.
Introduction.zh: 超级机枪豌豆射手每次发射 4 颗豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: 4x
upgrades to 5x firing speed if given Plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使用叶绿素后，升级成为5倍射速

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of 100 normal, fire, and plasma peas
every burst, each pea has a 55% to be a regular pea, 30% to be a fire pea, and 15% to be a plasma pea
DESCRIPTION.zh: 每次爆炸，每颗豌豆都有55%的概率是普通豌豆，30%的概率是火焰豌豆，15%的概率是等离子豌豆。

Chat.en: Despite his gatling barrels looking like cigarettes, Commando Pea actually devotes a lot of his time and effort into supporting anti-smoking campaigns. He plantcotts. He advocates. He informs. And he's known for it. "It's anything to keep those young weeds from trying what I like to call 'em cancer sticks."
Chat.zh: “我曾经是某株植物的升级款，”超级机枪豌豆非常害羞地说，“但是我现在是一株独立的植物了,我有自己的志向、梦想，还有健身房会员！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires 4 random peas at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向敌人发射 4 颗豌豆，概率释放叶绿素效果

Introduction.en: Repeaters fire two peas at one time.
Introduction.zh: 双重射手每次发射两颗豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: 2x
Shoots a barrage of 90 peas, with a large pea in the end dealing 900 damage

Chat.en: "Everyone always asks me if we've met before," says Repeater."Everyone always asks me if we've met before. Wait, did I just say that?"
Chat.zh: “大家见到我总是问我们是不是见过，”双重射手说，“大家见到我总是问我们是不是见过。等等，这句话是不是说了两遍？”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots two peas at the enemy
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向敌人发射两颗豌豆

Introduction.en: Bonk Choys rapidly punch nearby enemies that are ahead or behind them.
Introduction.zh: 菜问快速击打身前或身后的敌人。

DESCRIPTION.en: can attack ahead and behind, prioritizes behind himself
DESCRIPTION.zh: 能击打身前和身后的敌人

DESCRIPTION.en: Rapidly punches around itself in a 3x3 area for 60 damage per hit

Chat.en: A freelance dentist on the side, he's offering a special this month - he'll knock two of your teeth out of the price of one!
Chat.zh: 菜问还是一位兼职牙医，这个月他还端上了一道“特色菜”————你能用拔掉一颗牙齿的价钱，让他给你敲掉两颗牙！

BriefIntroduction.en: Rapidly punches enemies ahead or behind
BriefIntroduction.zh: 快速击打身前或身后的敌人

Introduction.en: Iceberg Lettuces freezes a zombie when stepped on and chills them after they thaw.
Introduction.zh: 冰冻生菜会冻结一只踩中他的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, on contact
zombies are chilled after thawing for 15s
DESCRIPTION.zh: 僵尸解冻后15秒内会感到寒冷。

DESCRIPTION.en: Freezes the entire lawn for 15s

Chat.en: Don't get lost staring into Iceberg's adoably cute eyes. If you do, it will be your last step... but only if you're a zombie.
Chat.zh: 不要因为盯着他过分可爱的双眼而迷失自我。不然的话你将没法迈出下一步……除非你不是一只僵尸。

BriefIntroduction.en: Freezes zombies that step on it, and extinguishes flames
BriefIntroduction.zh: 冻结接触到的僵尸，并熄灭火炬

Introduction.en: Bloomerangs can hit multiple targets in their lane, twice each coming and going!
Introduction.zh: 回旋镖射手可以每次击打本行的多个目标，回旋镖来回都能造成伤害！

DESCRIPTION.en: Quickly whirls 15 boomerangs in a cross shape

Chat.en: As the first new member to your home defence team, Bloomerang enjoys long walkabouts with his friends, Koala Bear, and listening to his Bob Barley albums out back.
Chat.zh: 由于他是植物队列里的第一位稀客，回旋镖射手非常享受与他的朋友考拉散步，并在回来的时候听鲍勃·大麦的专辑。

BriefIntroduction.en: Hits up to three targets in its lane, twice
BriefIntroduction.zh: 击打本行的三个目标，各两次

Introduction.en: Bamboo Shoots burrow back and forth on the ground, damaging zombies that step on them.
Introduction.zh: 竹笋在地面上来回移动，对经过的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Quickly burrows through the ground, knocking back zombies for 625 damage with chances of flinging them off the lawn

Chat.en: Bamboo Shoot learned Earth Traversal from Tu Xingsun. After years of grinding (literally), he got his "Underground Traversal Degree" in Tunnel Engineering.
Chat.zh: 竹笋从土行孙那里习得地行术功夫, 又经过不懈努力, 终于获得“钻头工程学院”学土学位。

BriefIntroduction.en: Burrows back and forth and damages zombies that step on them
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在地面上来回移动，对经过的僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Cabbage-pults hurl cabbages at the enemy.
Introduction.zh: 卷心菜投手向敌人投掷卷心菜。

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires a massive cabbage to each zombie on the lawn for 560 damage per cabbage

Chat.en: Cabbage-pult received his doctorate in pulting from Harvest University. He knows a thing or two about launching hit way to the top. He also makes a mean soup.
Chat.zh: 卷心菜投手在哈丰大学的投掷专业获取了博士学位。他在投掷方面可谓登峰造极。他也懂得做出美味的热汤！

BriefIntroduction.en: Hurls cabbages over obstacles at the enemy
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷能跨越障碍物的卷心菜

SORT.en: Reduces zombie defense by 5% per hit

Introduction.en: Blooming Hearts lob projectiles that infatuate zombies, causing their defences to be reduced and making all forms of damage stronger by 5% per hit.
Introduction.zh: 心蕊向僵尸投掷子弹，使之防御力下降。

DESCRIPTION.en: Launches hearts at every zombie on the lawn, dealing 300 damage per heart and reducing their defenses by 20%

Chat.en: Blooming Heart loves zombies. She gets guff from her fellow plants over it, but she stands firm. She's into zombies and makes no apologies about it.
Chat.zh: 心蕊喜欢僵尸，并因此受到植物同伴的嘲笑，但她依然坚持己见。她对僵尸情有独钟，而且毫无愧疚。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs projectiles that infatuate zombies, causing their defences to be reduced
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷子弹，使之防御力下降

Introduction.en: Shrinking Violets shrinks zombies in an area, causing them to take double damage and halving the bite damage they inflict on your precious plants.
Introduction.zh: 畏缩紫罗兰将范围内僵尸缩小，减少他们的啃咬速度，使他们承受两倍的攻击。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates on contact
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，接触到僵尸时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: affects zombies in surrounding tiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 缩小周围格子范围内的所有僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: shrinks imps to oblivion
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使小鬼僵尸缩小至消失

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinks every zombie on the lawn

Chat.en: Shrinking Violet started out shy, but it's remarkable how a discovering a magical talent for zombie-reduction can change your whole outlook.
Chat.zh: 畏缩紫罗兰一开始很害羞，但当她发现自己在减少僵尸方面的神奇才能后，她的整个观念都发生了巨大的变化。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shrinks zombies and makes them weaker
BriefIntroduction.zh: 缩小僵尸，使他们变弱

Introduction.en: Solar Sages illuminate zombies, causing them to make better choices and depart, leaving behind a trail of sun.
Introduction.zh: 阳光鼠尾草感化僵尸，使他们心甘情愿地离开，并沿路产出阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates on contact
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，接触到僵尸时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: vulnerable to critters and mechs
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在动物和机器面前十分脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: Illuminates 3 random zombies on the lawn

Chat.en: "Ommm," Solar Sage hums softly to herself. But she's not kidding anybody. We all know her mind is filled with race cars, sci-fi and bulldozers.
Chat.zh: “嗡——嗡——”阳光鼠尾草低声吟诵着。但谁都骗不了，大家都知道她满脑子跑车和推土机。

BriefIntroduction.en: Illuminates zombies for sun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 感化僵尸，使之生产阳光

Introduction.en: Lychees damage zombies in an area around it when attacked.
Introduction.zh: 荔枝在受到伤害时对范围内的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: damages all zombies in a 3x3 area when attacked
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受到伤害时对 3x3 范围内所有僵尸造成伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Gains a metallic pericarp that doubles its damage and reduces bite damage by 50%
Plantfooded Lychees can be repaired with Wall-Nut First Aid

Chat.en: Lychee knows gratitude, but bears any of his enemies a grudge. He always keep those in mind, "Tit for tat is fair play. Receive drips of water when in need, and return the kindness with a spring."
Chat.zh: 荔枝懂得感恩，当然也会记仇，心中总是默念：“人不犯我，我不犯人；滴水之恩，涌泉相报！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Hurts zombies in an area when attacked
BriefIntroduction.zh: 受伤时对范围内僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Atomic Bombegranates explode on contact, dealing heavy damage in a huge area and spawning Seedlings around them.
Introduction.zh: 原子石榴弹在被僵尸接触时自爆，生成小种子。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, on contact
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，接触到僵尸时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: starts with Seedling
Seedlings around will grow up into new bombegranates
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在周围产生的小种子长大后会变成新的原子石榴弹

DESCRIPTION.en: All fully bombegranates on the lawn explode, with seedlings instantly growing to their full stage

Chat.en: Remember: Never EVER split a fruit. Oh wait, hold on, fruits are okay actually, that was a false alarm. Just NEVER split an atom. Don't say I didn't warn ya!
Chat.zh: 记住，永远不要，千万不要切开一个水果。哦，不对，切开水果没关系，不要切开原子就行。

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes on contact, spawning Seedlings around
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在僵尸触碰时爆炸，并在周围生成小种子

Introduction.en: Potato Mines explode on contact, but they take time to arm. Plant them ahead of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 土豆地雷在被僵尸接触时自爆，但是他们需要时间做准备。将他们种在僵尸的前方。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, delayed activation
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，需要等待一段时间才能启动

DESCRIPTION.en: contact
Spawns 3 clones of itself to different locations on the lawn

Chat.en: Believe it or not, SPUDOW! did not happen overnight. Having been forced to try out new catchphrases and focus testing as many variation as possible (Tubular? Really?), Potato Mine weeded out the competition to stick with what he knows best.
Chat.zh: 爱信不信，昨晚一晚上没发出“轰隆————”声。他专注于尝试别的爆炸声，而且尝试了非常多种类（甚至有吸管的咕噜声？）土豆地雷最后不得不放弃对于突破现状的斗争，只能继续“轰隆————”了……

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes on contact, but takes time to arm itself
BriefIntroduction.zh: 种植一段时间后，在僵尸触碰时爆炸

Introduction.en: Peashooters are your first line of defence. They shoot peas at attacking zombies
Introduction.zh: 豌豆射手是你的第一道防线。他们会向僵尸发射豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of 75 peas

Chat.en: "What is it like being famous?"asked Peashooter while sipping his bottled water,"I can't talk right now, I'm finishing my merchandising deal. Hold my fir coat."
Chat.zh: “成为名人是什么感觉？”豌豆射手问了一句，抿了一口自己的瓶装水，“我现在没法说话，我正在完成我的销售项目，帮我拿一下我的毛皮大衣。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots peas at the enemies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸发射豌豆子弹

Introduction.en: Sunflowers are essential for you to produce extra sun. Try planting as many as you can!
Introduction.zh: 向日葵为你提供额外的阳光。种得越多越好！

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly produces 150 sun

Chat.en: After the release of her first major YouTuber video "Zombies On Your Lawn", Sunflower's YouTube channel has been bursting with fun. She is currently putting the final touches on her reality show TV pitch "Sunflower Thinks She Can Dance".
Chat.zh: 在发布了她的第一个油管视频 "Zombies On Your Lawn"，向日葵的油管频道充满了欢声笑语。她现在正在完善她的真人秀电视节目 "Sunflower Thinks She Can Dance" 的各种细节。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gives you additional sun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 提供额外的阳光

Introduction.en: Shine Vines are vine plants that amplify the sun production of sun producer plants, except Moonflower, create some sun on their own, and use a sun-stun burst as a last second defense when attacked.
Introduction.zh: 闪耀藤蔓能促进其依附的阳光植物的生产，使它们在生产时产出更多的阳光，月光花除外。在受到威胁的时候用阳光闪晕身边的僵尸作为防御。

DESCRIPTION.en: Stuns every zombie around itself in a 3x3 area and making them produce 5 sun each, protecting plants inside

Chat.en: "Peek-a-boo!" giggles Shine Vine, staring directly at you, the player. "Consider that fourth wall SHATTERED!"
Chat.zh: “躲猫猫！” 闪耀藤蔓咯咯笑着，直勾勾地盯着屏幕前的你。“就当这第四面墙已经碎了吧！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Increases sun production
BriefIntroduction.zh: 促进阳光的生产

Introduction.en: Primal Sunflowers pop out large suns instead of regular ones.
Introduction.zh: 原始向日葵产出大型阳光，而不是普通的阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly produces 225 sun

Chat.en: Primal Sunflower is new to all this sun-giving business, so be patient with her. She's an early adopter of the all-you-can-stuff-yourself buffet style of sun production.
Chat.zh: 原始向日葵是阳光交易的新手，所以对她耐心点。她可是“想拿多少拿多少”自助阳光早期体验者之一。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gives large suns
BriefIntroduction.zh: 提供巨大的阳光

Introduction.en: Wall-nuts have hard shells which you can use to protect your other plants.
Introduction.zh: 坚果墙利用自己坚硬的外壳保护其身后的植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: Gains a metal shell that adds 4000 extra toughness

Chat.en: Having retired from his days as a champion bowler in the Pro Leagues, Wall-nut is looking forward to a real challenge on the front lines of home defence. DEFENCE! DEFENCE!
Chat.zh: 自从退休，坚果墙不再在专业团队中作为一个冠军保龄球选手，他正憧憬着面对真正的挑战————在他的前院作为防线。守卫！守卫！

BriefIntroduction.en: Blocks off zombies and protects your other plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 抵挡僵尸并保护身后的植物

Introduction.en: Dragon Fruits launch 3 dragon fruit seeds at zombies across 3 adjacent lanes. Seeds that land will spawn seedlings, which grow into baby Dragon Fruits.
Introduction.zh: 暴君火龙果会向三相邻行的敌人发射三颗爆炸性子弹。被击败后，会分裂成三株小暴君火龙果。

DESCRIPTION.en: Spawns 3 baby Dragon Fruits across the lawn if eaten
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影形态的暴君火龙果会使子弹带毒

DESCRIPTION.en: Dragon fruit seeds explode for 25 damage (35 at middle stage) if eaten before growing
powered Dragon Fruits apply poison to the projectiles (25 damage, 2.5s poison duration)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影形态的暴君火龙果会使子弹带毒

DESCRIPTION.en: Deploys 2 dragon fruit seeds for 200 damage at every zombie at the lawn, spawning seedlings on contact

Chat.en: While each head of Dragon Fruit doesn't have their own name, they do each have their own unique personality. The Center head is the calm, rational one. While Lefty is a bit reserved and shy. Righty is... Well... always right.
Chat.zh: 尽管暴君火龙果的三颗头并没有各自的名字，他们却有着独特的性格。中间的那个冷静理性，左边的内敛害羞，右边的那个总是护“佑”着大家。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches 3 seeds in 3 lanes that can grow into more baby Dragon Fruits
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向三行的僵尸投掷爆裂子弹

Introduction.en: Moonflowers radiate shadow aura that powers up surrounding shadow plants.
Introduction.zh: 月光花释放可以使周围暗影植物进入暗影状态的月光。

DESCRIPTION.en: emits sun as well as additional sun for each adjacent shadow plants up to four
DESCRIPTION.zh: 随着身边暗影植物增多而增多，四株（包括自己）时最多

DESCRIPTION.en: plant 3 shadow plants nearby to power the Moonflower itself
DESCRIPTION.zh: 随着身边暗影植物增多而增多，四株（包括自己）时最多

DESCRIPTION.en: Spawns a shield around itself that covers a 3x3 area that can absorb 1000 bite damage

Chat.en: Moonflower is a fierce collaborator. She'll collaborate with anything. She'd collaborate with a table if she could.
Chat.zh: 月光花非常喜欢合作。她可以和任何事物合作。如果可以的话，她甚至能和一张桌子合作。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gives suns and powers up adjacent shadow plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 生产阳光并强化周围的暗影植物

Introduction.en: Grimroses are ranged shadow plants that drags the first zombie in its lane into the ground.
Introduction.zh: 暗樱草是一种暗影植物，她就像是陆地上的缠绕水草，最多可将 3 个僵尸拖入地下。

DESCRIPTION.en: powered Grimroses can drag 3 zombies before expiring
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时才能发挥拖下 3 只僵尸的能力

DESCRIPTION.en: Drags 3 random zombies on the lawn into the ground

Chat.en: "When you think about it, the proper place for a zombie is in the ground," says Grimrose. "So, really, I'm just expediting the process."
Chat.zh: “仔细想想，僵尸本就该待在地里，”暗樱草说， “所以实际上，我只是在加速这个过程罢了。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Drags zombies into the ground
BriefIntroduction.zh: 把僵尸拖入地底

Introduction.en: Nightshades are shadow plants that smack zombies with slappy leaves. Hurls and regrows its leaves when powered by other Shadow plants.
Introduction.zh: 暗影龙葵是一种暗影植物，能用叶子猛烈地拍击僵尸。当其他阴影植物为其提供能量时，它的叶子会喷射并重新生长。

DESCRIPTION.en: hurls and regrows leaves when powered
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时能重新长出叶片，并远程抛出

DESCRIPTION.en: Hurls 3 boosted leaves that deal 1200 damage each and permanently has a damage boost (800 damage)

Chat.en: For Nightshade, smacking is a duty and a privilege. He comes from a long line of ardent smackers, and his family counts three kings, four ambassadors and a president as among those proudly slapped around.
Chat.zh: 对暗影龙葵来说，扇耳光是一份义务，也是一种特权。他的家族有三位国王、四位大使和一位总统，他们都曾以导出扇别人耳光为荣。

BriefIntroduction.en: Smacks zombies with slappy leaves
BriefIntroduction.zh: 用叶子猛烈地拍击僵尸

Introduction.en: Dusk Lobbers are shadow plants that lob explosive buds down the lane.
Introduction.zh: 幽暮投手沿着本行投掷炸裂性花蕾，也属于暗影植物。得到暗影能量时会沿着三行投掷。

DESCRIPTION.en: lob buds down 3 lanes when powered
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时能沿着三行投掷花蕾

DESCRIPTION.en: Lobs 5 massive cactus flower buds at that zombies that deal 240 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Lobbing comes easily for Dusk Lobber, but that's only because she's had extensive training and really enjoys parabolas.
Chat.zh: 对幽暮投手来说，投掷很容易，但这只是因为她受过大量的训练，而且非常喜欢抛物线。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs explosive buds
BriefIntroduction.zh: 投掷炸裂性花蕾

Introduction.en: Dusk Lobbers are shadow plants that lob explosive buds down the lane that stun for a brief duration.
Introduction.zh: 幽暮投手沿着本行投掷炸裂性花蕾，也属于暗影植物。得到暗影能量时会沿着三行投掷。

DESCRIPTION.en: lob buds down 3 lanes when powered
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时能沿着三行投掷花蕾

DESCRIPTION.en: Lobs 4 massive cactus flower buds at that zombies that deal 240 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Lobbing comes easily for Dusk Lobber, but that's only because she's had extensive training and really enjoys parabolas.
Chat.zh: 对幽暮投手来说，投掷很容易，但这只是因为她受过大量的训练，而且非常喜欢抛物线。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs explosive buds that stun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 投掷炸裂性花蕾

Introduction.en: Dusk Lobbers are shadow plants that lob explosive buds down the lane that apply light poison damage.
Introduction.zh: 幽暮投手沿着本行投掷炸裂性花蕾，也属于暗影植物。得到暗影能量时会沿着三行投掷。

DESCRIPTION.en: lob buds down 3 lanes when powered
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时能沿着三行投掷花蕾

DESCRIPTION.en: poison deals 25 DPS for 1s all affected targets
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时能沿着三行投掷花蕾

DESCRIPTION.en: Lobs 6 massive cactus flower buds at that zombies that deal 240 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Lobbing comes easily for Dusk Lobber, but that's only because she's had extensive training and really enjoys parabolas.
Chat.zh: 对幽暮投手来说，投掷很容易，但这只是因为她受过大量的训练，而且非常喜欢抛物线。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs explosive buds that stun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 投掷炸裂性花蕾

Introduction.en: Snow Peas fire frozen peas making it hard for zombies to advance. He also has a chance to shoot a freezing pea that immobilizes all zombies in a half-tile area.
Introduction.zh: 冰冻豌豆射手发射冰冻豌豆，减缓僵尸的速度。他还可以发射大型冰冻豌豆，冻结1x1范围内的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: chills and damages zombie on impact
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹会对僵尸造成伤害并冰冻

DESCRIPTION.en: Chills the entire lane and fires a burst of 80 chilling peas

Chat.en: As a professional table tennis player, in the off-season he also enjoys skiing, playing the bongos, and spelunking. He's also been having an unusual diet of refrigerated lettuce.
Chat.zh: 作为一名职业乒乓球运动员，他在休赛期还喜欢滑雪、打邦戈鼓和探洞。此外，他最近还吃着一种不寻常的冷食——冷藏生菜。就连他多年的对手“雪花莲”也搞不明白为什么。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots frozen peas that damage and slow zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸发射寒冰子弹

Introduction.en: Lightning Reeds shoot lightning at the nearest zombie up to one lane away. The bolt will then arc and hit other zombies.
Introduction.zh: 闪电芦苇对相邻行最近的目标发射闪电，击中时电弧会伤害周围的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons a lightning cloud that targets zombies and deals 200 DPS

Chat.en: This may come as a shock, but Lightning Reed has a serious passion for ham radio. His call sign is El3ctric H1ccup. You can tune in every Tuesday to hear him read the classics to elderly plants. This week: Seeds and Sensibility.
Chat.zh: 令人大惊的是，闪电芦苇热衷于业余广播。他呼号“闪嗝”。你能在每周二在他的频道听到他读名著给老植物们听。本周内容：播种和感性。

BriefIntroduction.en: Zaps several chickens or zombies per strike
BriefIntroduction.zh: 电击连续的几只僵尸或鸡

Introduction.en: Kernel-pults fling corn kernels and butter at zombies.
Introduction.zh: 玉米投手向僵尸投掷玉米粒和黄油。

DESCRIPTION.en: 20 (kernel, 65%), 60 (butter, 35%)
butter immobilizes zombies
Turns into a mortar and fires a butter for 200 damage to each zombie on the lawn

Chat.en: While working as an usher at the local movieplex, he saw "Fried Green Tomatoes" and found his higher calling. He packed up his husks, his kernels, his butter, and enlisted.
Chat.zh: 在电影院当招待员时，他看了《油炸绿西红柿》并找到了更长远的目标。于是他把他的玉米壳、玉米粒、黄油打包起来后参与了战斗。

BriefIntroduction.en: Flings corn kernels and butter at zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷黄油和玉米粒

Introduction.en: Snowdrops throw chilly snow balls and freezy icicles at zombies.
Introduction.zh: 雪滴花向僵尸投掷寒冷的雪球和结冰的冰锥。

DESCRIPTION.en: icicles freezes zombies
Bursts out an icicle that deals 25 damage to every zombie on the lawn, freezing them

Chat.en: Zombies are always looking at her with a frozen expression.
Chat.zh: 僵尸看到她时心都凉了半截。

BriefIntroduction.en: Throw snow balls and icicles at zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷雪球和冰锥

Introduction.en: Meteor Flowers conjure meteor strikes from the sky that leave molten tiles.
Introduction.zh: 流星花从天上召唤流星，砸地时留下岩浆。

DESCRIPTION.en: meteors scare dinosaurs in the lane, forcing them to escape
DESCRIPTION.zh: 流星惊吓恐龙，迫使它们逃跑

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires several meteors consecutively, with each meteor dealing 150 damage and spawning lava puddles

Chat.en: "Out of this world molten mayhem! But first... coffee!"
Chat.zh: “熔融的骚乱啊，滚出这个世界！但是在此之前……喝口咖啡！！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Conjures meteor strikes from the sky that leaves molten tiles
BriefIntroduction.zh: 从空中召唤能融化地面的流星

Introduction.en: Spring Beans bounce back zombies that get too close. Will bounce them into adjacent water tiles in present.
Introduction.zh: 弹簧豆会将接触的僵尸往回弹。当附近有水时，将他们弹进水里。

DESCRIPTION.en: pushes zombies 3 tiles back or into the water
DESCRIPTION.zh: 将僵尸弹回，或弹进水里

DESCRIPTION.en: needs to rest after springing
Knocks every zombie on the lawn back 3 tiles

Chat.en: He's the strong, silent type and little is known about Spring Bean. What is known though: his fan club is a million followers strong. And the ladies love him.
Chat.zh: 他人狠话不多，而且很神秘。大家也只知道：他的粉丝体量高达百万，更是受到女孩子们的欢迎。

BriefIntroduction.en: Bounces zombies back and into nearby water
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将僵尸向右侧弹开，或弹进周围的水里

Introduction.en: Umbrella Leaves protect plants from falling threats.
Introduction.zh: 伞叶保护植物免受来自空中的威胁。

DESCRIPTION.en: pushes zombies fell from sky to the right
DESCRIPTION.zh: 将从空而降的僵尸弹回到最右边

DESCRIPTION.en: invalidates falling projectiles
Becomes invisible, allowing zombies to walk through her and planting plants inside of her

Chat.en: She's not very frond of getting wet.
Chat.zh: 她不是很喜欢被“霖”湿。

BriefIntroduction.en: Protects plants from falling threats
BriefIntroduction.zh: 保护植物免受来自空中的威胁

Introduction.en: Cycloquats spin rapidly, creating a cyclone that drags zombies to it in a medium area.
Introduction.zh: 漩涡枇杷旋转并把范围内的僵尸向自己吸引。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
hovers above ground and water

Chat.en: Cycloquat, who dreams and aspires of becoming a ballet dancer, has been applying for the advanced aerial ballet academy for YEARS now, only to be hit with a rejection every single time. "I know I could be the greatest ballet dancer in the world, but no one wants to accept me. I just don't get it!" she weeps, taking a big mouthful of pepper-mint ice cream.
Chat.zh: 梦想成为芭蕾舞演员的漩涡枇杷有一项绝活：她可以在原地旋转很多圈。“我觉得我一定能成为这个世界上最伟大的芭蕾舞演员，但是没有人愿意聘请我，我不理解为什么会这样。”漩涡枇杷沮丧地说，顺便吞下了一大口冰激凌。

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates a cyclone that pulls zombies to itself
BriefIntroduction.zh: 保护植物免受来自空中的威胁

Introduction.en: Pod Pilots deploy three flying pea commandos that launch heavy attacks on zombies closest to home.
Introduction.zh: 豌豆突击队派遣三只突击豌豆飞行小兵，向最靠左侧的三名僵尸发动突袭。

DESCRIPTION.en: hovers above ground and water
Summons 6 pea pilots, flying to different zombies and shooting laser beams dealing 600 damage each

Chat.en: The Pod Pilots trio were the prodigies of aviation school and they've decided to band together as soon as they qualified for the "Air Raid" elite selection. Despite their constant claims of proficiency, it doesn't convince any of the other plants to take a bumpy ride on their beloved mothership.
Chat.zh: “豌豆突击队是“壮植凌云”精英选拔中落选的一批，比起那些趁夜突击僵尸基地的精英们，他们更适合在自己的基地做好守卫工作！

BriefIntroduction.en: Flies to zombies across the lawn and deals heavy damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对一群僵尸造成大量伤害

Introduction.en: Wasabi Whips lash out with their flaming whips, delivering whippings to zombies both in front and behind.
Introduction.zh: 炙热山葵挥舞火焰长鞭，抽打前后的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: can whip zombies both front and back simultaneously
DESCRIPTION.zh: 每次射击有大约 30% 的几率发射等离子豌豆

DESCRIPTION.en: Rapidly lashes its whip around itself, scorching zombies around it for 300 DPS over 7.5s

Chat.en: "The trick to proper whipping is all in the wrist," says Wasabi Whip. "Well, not the wrist, exactly, since I don't have any. You have to, like... BE the wrist."
Chat.zh: “正确甩鞭的诀窍全在手腕上，”炙热山葵说道。“呃，严格来说也不是手腕，因为我压根没有。你得……嗯……化身成为手腕本身。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Rapidly whips both ahead and behind
BriefIntroduction.zh: 抽打身前和身后的敌人

Introduction.en: Goo Peas shoot poisonous peas that deal crippling poison at zombies, as well as dealing minor slow as poison damage stacks.
Introduction.zh: 黏毒豌豆向僵尸发射毒性子弹，利用剧毒伤害僵尸，并使之减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: poison damage ignores armour and stacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 毒素伤害无视护甲并可累积。

DESCRIPTION.en: deals minor, stacking slow (2%)

Chat.en: Goo Pea is incredibly goopy. See? See how that works? It's a play on words. Words are often playful, folks!
Chat.zh: 黏毒豌豆是黏弹的射手。懂了吗？明白其中的妙处了吗？这有个多音字。朋友们，语言往往就是这么有趣！

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots crippling poison peas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射黏性毒液豌豆子弹

Introduction.en: Melon-pults do heavy damage to groups of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 西瓜投手会对成群的僵尸造成大量伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Turns into a mortar and blasts melons all over the lawn, with 400 damage per melon

Chat.en: "Everyone says my head looks like a melon," said the middle child of the Pult-family, "and they would be right." Don't ask him if he's seedless or not though, it offends him and frankly it's none of your business.
Chat.zh: “很多人说我的头像个西瓜，”投手家族的老二说，“而且被他们说中了。”别问他是不是无籽的，这对他来说很冒犯，而且这不关你事。

BriefIntroduction.en: Does heavy damage to groups of zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对一群僵尸造成大量伤害

Introduction.en: Dark Matter Dragonfruits are shadow plants that charge up explosive, dark energy stars and launch them at the zombies. When powered, they deal slow that scales with the zombie's health.
Introduction.zh: 西瓜投手会对成群的僵尸造成大量伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: deals 40 direct damage/80 splash when powered, 50 direct damage/95 splash damage otherwise
DESCRIPTION.zh: 比起直接接触其子弹的僵尸，受到子弹暗能量爆炸波及的僵尸会受到更高的伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: when powered, the more health a zombie has, the more slow/heaviness is dealt (heaviness reudces knockback)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 得到暗影能量时，僵尸越健全，沉重效果越显著

DESCRIPTION.en: Charges up a massive star of dark matter, which blasts out a dark stellar beam that deals a massive 400 DPS and knocks back zombies in its lane for 6s

Chat.en: Dark Matter Dragonfruit's ancient ancestors were vigorously hunted, retreating them into the darkest, deepest depths of space. Now their descendants are back for cold, fruity vengeance.
Chat.zh: “暗物质火龙果的祖先曾被猎杀至太空深处。如今，他们的后代带着冰冷的果实复仇归来了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches stars that deal massive damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射能造成巨大伤害的恒星

Introduction.en: Hami-pults lob hami melons that explode above zombies, dealing massive damage without contact.
Introduction.zh: 哈密瓜投手会以不让子弹砸到僵尸的方式对他们造成大量伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Can hit Parasol and Jester zombies, as well as Abbot Staff Zombies without its projectiles being deflected
lobbed hami melons explode above zombies
Turns into a mortar and blasts hami-melons all over the lawn, with 700 damage per melon

Chat.en: As one of the most heat-relieving fruits, Hami-pult hates those who claimed him to cause "inner heat". He directs this fury towards zombies and they hardly survive from this.
Chat.zh: 作为最解暑的水果之一，哈密瓜投手痛恨那些给自己扣上“上火”帽子的家伙，他把这股怒火用到了僵尸身上，效果拔群。

BriefIntroduction.en: Heavily damages groups of zombies without smashing them
BriefIntroduction.zh: 不直接砸中，子弹在空中对成群僵尸造成大量伤害

Introduction.en: Hami-pults lob hami melons that explode above zombies, dealing high damage without contact.
Introduction.zh: 哈密瓜投手会以不让子弹砸到僵尸的方式对他们造成大量伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Can hit Parasol and Jester zombies, as well as Abbot Staff Zombies without its projectiles being deflected
lobbed hami melons explode above zombies
Turns into a mortar and blasts hami-melons all over the lawn, with 700 damage per melon

Chat.en: As one of the most heat-relieving fruits, Hami-pult hates those who claimed him to cause "inner heat". He directs this fury towards zombies and they hardly survive from this.
Chat.zh: 作为最解暑的水果之一，哈密瓜投手痛恨那些给自己扣上“上火”帽子的家伙，他把这股怒火用到了僵尸身上，效果拔群。

BriefIntroduction.en: Heavily damages groups of zombies without smashing them
BriefIntroduction.zh: 不直接砸中，子弹在空中对成群僵尸造成大量伤害

Introduction.en: Hami-pults lob juicy hami melons that explode above zombies, dealing high damage without contact and creating slowing melon juice puddles.
Introduction.zh: 哈密瓜投手会以不让子弹砸到僵尸的方式对他们造成大量伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Can hit Parasol and Jester zombies, as well as Abbot Staff Zombies without its projectiles being deflected
lobbed hami melons explode above zombies
hami melon juice slows down zombies
Turns into a mortar and blasts hami-melons all over the lawn, with 700 damage per melon

Chat.en: As one of the most heat-relieving fruits, Hami-pult hates those who claimed him to cause "inner heat". He directs this fury towards zombies and they hardly survive from this.
Chat.zh: 作为最解暑的水果之一，哈密瓜投手痛恨那些给自己扣上“上火”帽子的家伙，他把这股怒火用到了僵尸身上，效果拔群。

BriefIntroduction.en: Heavily damages groups of zombies without smashing them
BriefIntroduction.zh: 不直接砸中，子弹在空中对成群僵尸造成大量伤害

Introduction.en: Winter Melons do heavy damage and slow to groups of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 冰西瓜会对成群的僵尸造成大量伤害，并使他们减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: Turns into a mortar and blasts winter melons all over the lawn, with 400 damage per melon and chills

Chat.en: You may recognize Winter Melon's voice from such incredible documentaries as "It's Cold Up Here","Ice Bingo", and "Surfin' Swedes".
Chat.zh: 你可以在一些有名的文献里看读出冰西瓜的写作腔调，比如《高处不胜寒》《冰果》以及《冲浪的甘蓝》。

BriefIntroduction.en: Does heavy damage and slows groups of zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对一群僵尸造成大量伤害并减速

Introduction.en: Winter Melons do heavy damage and slow to groups of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 冰西瓜会对成群的僵尸造成大量伤害，并使他们减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: Turns into a mortar and blasts winter melons all over the lawn, with 400 damage per melon and chills

Chat.en: You may recognize Winter Melon's voice from such incredible documentaries as "It's Cold Up Here","Ice Bingo", and "Surfin' Swedes".
Chat.zh: 你可以在一些有名的文献里看读出冰西瓜的写作腔调，比如《高处不胜寒》《冰果》以及《冲浪的甘蓝》。

BriefIntroduction.en: Does heavy damage and slows groups of zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对一群僵尸造成大量伤害并减速

Introduction.en: Winter Melons lob massive damaging melons that temporarily freeze and chill zombies in a 3x3 area.
Introduction.zh: 冰西瓜会对成群的僵尸造成大量伤害，并使他们减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: Turns into a mortar and blasts winter melons all over the lawn, with 400 damage per melon and chills

Chat.en: You may recognize Winter Melon's voice from such incredible documentaries as "It's Cold Up Here","Ice Bingo", and "Surfin' Swedes".
Chat.zh: 你可以在一些有名的文献里看读出冰西瓜的写作腔调，比如《高处不胜寒》《冰果》以及《冲浪的甘蓝》。

BriefIntroduction.en: Does heavy damage and freezes/slows groups of zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对一群僵尸造成大量伤害并减速

Introduction.en: Blovers blow away all zombies in the air.
Introduction.zh: 三叶草会吹飞空中的所有僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
blows away all flying zombies

Chat.en: The luckiest stunt clover around, Blover is the most recent recipient of the Stunty Award. You can see his work in "Bulb Fiction," "Rooty", and "Finding Flower". He also teaches stunt class on Tuesdays at the community center. Also, don't call him common.
Chat.zh: 作为最幸运的特技三叶草，三叶草也是特技奖的获得者。你可以在“球茎小说”、“寻根”和“寻花”中看到他的作品。他还每周二在社区中心教特技课。

BriefIntroduction.en: Blows away all flying and floating zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吹飞所有的飞行僵尸

Introduction.en: Spikeweeds destroy one rolling object and hurt any zombies that step on them.
Introduction.zh: 地刺摧毁一滚动前行的目标，并且对经过的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: can't be eaten by zombies
can be crushed by rolling zombies, but destroys whatever rolls over it
DESCRIPTION.zh: 会被滚动前行的僵尸摧毁

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons spikes from the ground throughout the lane, pulling zombies to itself and dealing 400 DPS

Chat.en: Although Spikeweed grew up on the seedy side of town, his acupuncture business has been blooming.
Chat.zh: 尽管地刺在村里的播种地长大，他的针灸事业也在蓬勃发展。

BriefIntroduction.en: Breaks 1 rolling object, hurts zombies that step on it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对走过的僵尸造成伤害，并破坏 1 个滚动的物体

Introduction.en: Frostweeds damage and chill zombies that walk over them.
Introduction.zh: 冰地刺对经过的僵尸造成伤害，并使之冷冻。

DESCRIPTION.en: can't be eaten by zombies
can take three hits from rolling zombies when fed with Plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使用叶绿素后能承受滚动前行的僵尸三次打击

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons a ice saw that mows through the lane, pushing zombies back and dealing 900 DPS, also gaining a permanent damage boost to 20

Chat.en: Frostweed is excited to get the call-up to the big leagues and can't wait to start refrigerating zombies whilst inflicting damage on them. Yep, he insisted we say "whilst."
Chat.zh: 冰地刺激动地收到了顶级联赛的召唤，迫不及待地想要开始让扎穿僵尸，冻时冷藏他们。他坚持要我们用“冻时”而不是“同时”。

BriefIntroduction.en: Hurts and chills zombies that step on it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对走过的僵尸造成伤害并使之冷冻

Introduction.en: Spikerocks destroy multiple rolling objects, and deal high damage zombies that walk over them.
Introduction.zh: 钢地刺摧毁多个滚动前行的目标，并且对经过的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: can't be eaten by zombies
can take six hits from rolling objects and smashes
DESCRIPTION.zh: 能承受滚动前行的僵尸三次打击

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons rocky spikes from the ground, dealing 600 DPS and pulling zombies towards itself

Chat.en: Being the most metal plant, Spikerock has decided to hold his ultimate metal plant concert at Madison Rock Garden. Tickets have been sold out for many harvests. He's also taken advantage of being the most rocky plant, and has already began to compose his next rock jam album.
Chat.zh: 作为最具金属性的植物，钢地刺打算在麦迪生石头花园举办他的终极重金属音乐节。票已经售罄了好几个丰收季了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Breaks 3 rolling objects, hurts zombies that step on it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对走过的僵尸造成伤害，并破坏 3 个滚动的物体

Introduction.en: Chompers can devour 2 zombies whole, but are vulnerable while chewing.
Introduction.zh: 大嘴花可以完整地吃掉两只僵尸，但是他们在咀嚼时很脆弱。

DESCRIPTION.en: vunerability between chomps
Pulls up to 7 zombies to itself, devouring them instantly, then burps and pushes all zombies back to where they started

Chat.en: Everyone appreciates what Chomper does. His appetite has saved them on numerous occasions. But truth be told, Chomper's friends think that eating zombies is gross. And his breath! No one has the heart to tell him, and he never gets the hint when you offer him a mint.
Chat.zh: 大家都因大嘴花的事迹而钦佩他。他奇特的口味三番两次地拯救了他们。但是说实话，大嘴花的朋友们觉得吃僵尸很恶心。而且他口气很重！但是大家都不愿意告诉他这一点，即使送他一颗薄荷糖也不能让他意识到这一点。

BriefIntroduction.en: Devours 2 zombies, then chews on each for a while
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吃掉僵尸，并花费时间消化

Introduction.en: Click on Ice-shrooms to freeze and chill all zombies on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 点击寒冰菇冻结全屏的僵尸，此后需要一段时间恢复。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to freeze all zombies on the lawn
emits cold mists that chill zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 释放能令僵尸减速的冰雾

DESCRIPTION.en: zombies are chilled after thawing for 10s
DESCRIPTION.zh: 僵尸解冻后10秒内会感到寒冷。

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly feezes all the zombies on the lawn and gains an ability that freezes zombies eating and permanently boosts Winter-Mint plants around it

Chat.en: His coldness can make even flames feel chilly. His gaze is like an icicle in the cold winter. Just one look at him can make you feel the bone-chilling iciness. If you ask him to tell you a joke, even the air might freeze. That's why he's so popular with the other plants during the summer.
Chat.zh: 他的冷酷程度可以让火焰都能感到寒冷。他的眼神就像是冬天的冰柱，看一眼就能让你感觉到透进骨子里的寒冷。如果你要他讲一个笑话，可能连空气都能冷得凝固。因此，他在夏天特别受欢迎。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap to freeze all zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击冻结所有的僵尸

Introduction.en: Primal Wall-nuts cost a more than typical Wall-nuts, but they can be planted much more quickly.
Introduction.zh: 原始坚果墙比普通坚果墙需要更多阳光，但是能被更快地种植。

DESCRIPTION.en: can take three smashing hits
Gains rock-hard armour that adds 4000 extra toughness

Chat.en: "Grunt," explains Primal Wall-nut. "Grunt oog grunt-grunt," he goes on to say. "Ook-urg grunty grunt grunt," he concludes. A nut of many opinions, is Primal Wall-nut.
Chat.zh: “呼噜”，原始坚果墙解释着。“呼噜唔，呼噜呼噜，”他继续说道。“哦库噜呼噜呼噜，”他总结道。一个点子很多的坚果，就是原始坚果墙。

BriefIntroduction.en: Quick-planting wall that blocks off zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 冷却时间更短的坚果墙

Introduction.en: Buttercup butters butter onto attacking zombies, stunning them with butter. Butter!
Introduction.zh: 黄油毛茛向啃食她的僵尸投掷黄油，用黄油控制住他们。全是黄油！

DESCRIPTION.en: creates buttering butter splats
DESCRIPTION.zh: 黄油溅到地上，使碰到的僵尸沾上黄油

DESCRIPTION.en: Flings butter across the lawn which further spawn buttering tiles

Chat.en: Buttercup's sweet as can be, but she packs a wallop! "I'm not cheap," she says, referring to her flat 25 sun cost. "I'm reasonable."
Chat.zh: 黄油毛茛非常甜美，但是她也会发脾气！“我才不是便宜货，”她指着自己25阳光的平庸价格说道，“这个价格合情合理。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Butters attacking zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向啃食她的僵尸投掷黄油

Introduction.en: Banana Launchers can fire explosive bananas at any tile on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 香蕉火箭炮能向场内任意一格发射一枚爆炸性香蕉子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: anywhere on lawn
on impact, explodes in small area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹爆炸时，对小范围造成巨大伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly fires 3 bananas at random zombies on the lawn for 1800 damage per banana

Chat.en: It's important to avoid stereotyping as much as possible. Stereotypes are often flat-out wrong. And also hurtful. But honestly ... Banana Launcher is TOTALLY bananas.
Chat.zh: 最好是消除刻板印象，刻板印象普遍是错误的，而且很伤人。但是实话实说，香蕉火箭炮完全就是个香蕉。

BriefIntroduction.en: Click on banana, then a tile, to launch explosive banana
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击后，选择一格发射爆炸香蕉子弹

Introduction.en: Bamboozles can fire 5 bamboo sticks at most.
Introduction.zh: 整人竹可以发射最多 5 根竹竿。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: bamboo sticks turn into bamboo buskets when hitting the floor
DESCRIPTION.zh: 竹竿在砸到地面时会变成竹篮

DESCRIPTION.en: Ejects bamboo baskets onto the 5 rightmost plants on the lawn

Chat.en: Only when confronting the skilled plants from the Kongfu World could you be defeated by a single straw. The last straw, they'd add.
Chat.zh: 唯有在技艺高超的武林植物面前，你才会连一根草都打不过。

BriefIntroduction.en: Click on bamboo, then a tile, to launch bamboo sticks
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击后，选择一格发射竹竿

Introduction.en: Missile Toes launch cold blasts that damage, chill and freeze zombies.
Introduction.zh: 槲寄冰仙子发射寒冰子弹，对僵尸造成伤害并减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: anywhere on lawn
on impact, explodes in small area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹爆炸时，对小范围造成巨大伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly fires 3 ice mistles at random zombies on the lawn

Chat.en: While she is called Missile Toe, Missile Toe has no toes and, properly speaking, lacks missiles. How'd she get her name? Nepotism! Pure favoritism.
Chat.zh: 槲寄冰仙子也被叫做指尖火箭炮，尽管她没有手指头，准确来讲，她也没有火箭炮。那么她为什么会被这么称呼？裙带关系！比起另一个火箭炮，大家更喜欢她罢了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches chilling blasts
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射寒冰导弹

Introduction.en: Missile Toes launch cold blasts that damage, chill and freeze zombies.
Introduction.zh: 槲寄冰仙子发射寒冰子弹，对僵尸造成伤害并减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: anywhere on lawn
on impact, explodes in small area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹爆炸时，对小范围造成巨大伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly fires 3 ice mistles at random zombies on the lawn

Chat.en: While she is called Missile Toe, Missile Toe has no toes and, properly speaking, lacks missiles. How'd she get her name? Nepotism! Pure favoritism.
Chat.zh: 槲寄冰仙子也被叫做指尖火箭炮，尽管她没有手指头，准确来讲，她也没有火箭炮。那么她为什么会被这么称呼？裙带关系！比起另一个火箭炮，大家更喜欢她罢了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches chilling blasts
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射寒冰导弹

Introduction.en: Missile Toes launch cold blasts that damage, chill and freeze zombies.
Introduction.zh: 槲寄冰仙子发射寒冰子弹，对僵尸造成伤害并减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: anywhere on lawn
on impact, explodes in medium area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹爆炸时，对小范围造成巨大伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly fires 3 ice mistles at random zombies on the lawn

Chat.en: While she is called Missile Toe, Missile Toe has no toes and, properly speaking, lacks missiles. How'd she get her name? Nepotism! Pure favoritism.
Chat.zh: 槲寄冰仙子也被叫做指尖火箭炮，尽管她没有手指头，准确来讲，她也没有火箭炮。那么她为什么会被这么称呼？裙带关系！比起另一个火箭炮，大家更喜欢她罢了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches chilling blasts
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射寒冰导弹

Introduction.en: Cherry Bombs can blow up all zombies in a 3x3 area.
Introduction.zh: 樱桃炸弹会爆炸并对范围内所有僵尸造成伤害。他们会立刻爆炸，将他们种在僵尸附近。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: The Cherry Bomb Brothers attempted to start their own band. "We tried to figure out what the sound would be, but we kept explodonating speakers, stages, fans, and of course, zombies. Look for our LP next year."
Chat.zh: 樱桃炸弹兄弟尝试过建立他们自己的乐队。“我们尽力去搞清楚应该发出什么样的音色，但是我们一直炸坏音响，炸烂舞台，炸跑粉丝，当然也炸死了僵尸。希望明年还能找到我们的合伙人。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Blows up all zombies in a 3x3 area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 爆炸并对范围内僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Doom Shrooms can blow up all zombies in a huge area, leaving a crater.
Introduction.zh: 毁灭菇会爆炸并对范围内所有僵尸造成伤害，砸碎所在的格子，一段时间内无法种植植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: "Leave me far from what is valuable for you. How gentle I was to have told you that!"
Chat.zh: “别让我离你珍视的东西太近了，把这件事告诉你，我真是太温柔了。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Blows up all zombies in a huge area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 爆炸并对巨大范围内僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Instant plant that crushes zombies in the lane under its girthy jellified mass. Leaves behind a pool of acidic goo that both slows and damages zombies when a zombie is crushed.
Introduction.zh: 立刻从本行左侧冲出，利用沉重的黏冻碾压一整行的僵尸。击败僵尸时留下一块能对僵尸造成伤害的果冻。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: Cran Jelly is more than capable of changing into any other shapes. Cubes. Pyramids. Cones. Icosahedron. It can do it all. But few shapes are as structurally strong or offer as much zombie crushing power as the cylinder. Not to mention, it lets him go really fast.
Chat.zh: 果冻蔓越莓可不仅仅会变成各种各样的形状。方块，四棱锥，二十面体，他都能做到。但是几乎没有别的形状比圆柱体更坚固，更能摧毁僵尸。更别说，圆柱让他跑得更快！

BriefIntroduction.en: Crushes zombies in the lane under its girthy jellified mass
BriefIntroduction.zh: 碾压一行的僵尸

Introduction.en: Baby Dragon Bruits launch explosive seed pod projectiles at zombies.
Introduction.zh: 小暴君火龙果向僵尸投掷爆裂子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: powered Baby Dragon Fruits apply poison to the projectiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影形态的暴君火龙果会使子弹带毒

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly grows to its 3-headed state

Chat.en: As one of the heads from a Dragon Fruit, as mentioned, you can never find out his personality.
Chat.zh: 他是暴君火龙果留下的一颗头，如前文，你永远不会知道他是什么性格。

BriefIntroduction.en: Launches an explosive seed pod projectile at zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷爆裂子弹

Introduction.en: Torchwoods turn peas that pass through them into fireballs that deal twice as much damage. They also deal close damage as well as lane and columnwide flame damage on defeat.
Introduction.zh: 火炬树桩将经过的豌豆点燃，造成双倍伤害。他们也会对靠近的僵尸造成伤害，死亡时会在燃烧一整行的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: plant more Torchwoods to amplify the pea's damage further
DESCRIPTION.zh: 种植更多火炬树，以进一步加剧豌豆的伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Flames above it turn into plasma flames, turning incoming peas into plasma peas, which deal triple the damage of a normal pea

Chat.en: Torchwood and Snapdragon have become fast friends. They like to hang out at either the Tiki Lounge or the Renaissance Faire.
Chat.zh: 火炬树桩和火龙草形影不离。他们不是去提基酒馆，就是去学习复兴文化。

BriefIntroduction.en: Turns peas into fireballs and does lanewide damage upon consumption
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点燃经过的豌豆，死亡时对整行造成伤害

Introduction.en: Jalapeños set an entire lane on fire, burning and destroying zombies within.
Introduction.zh: 火爆辣椒摧毁一整行的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: This jalapeño is one spicy character by day and The Macramé Vigilante by night. You might be wondering what his secret weapons is... it's knots.
Chat.zh: 白天他还是一个暴躁的家伙，晚上就成为了一个细心的花边编织手。你可能好奇他的秘密武器是什么……是打结。

BriefIntroduction.en: Destroys an entire lane of zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 燃烧摧毁一整行的僵尸

Introduction.en: Perfume-shrooms enchant dinosaurs and charm them into working against the zombies.
Introduction.zh: 香水菇魅惑当行的恐龙，使它们帮上僵尸的倒忙。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
affects all dinosaurs in a lane

Chat.en: Perfume-shroom emits a pure, concentrated mist of aerosolized love.
Chat.zh: 香水菇释放出一股纯净且浓缩的雾状的爱。

BriefIntroduction.en: Charms dinosaurs against zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 魅惑恐龙以僵尸为敌

Introduction.en: Puff-shrooms are free, short-range shooters.
Introduction.zh: 蘑菇怪是廉价的近距离射程武器。

DESCRIPTION.en: Triggers the plantfoods of all Puff-shrooms and Sea-shrooms on the lawn, rapidly shooting 45 spores

Chat.en: Puff-shroom is hip to all the latest social networks. He loves to surf Sporebook, ShroomedIn and Fungigram. But he sometimes misses the simple camaraderie of a good ol' fashioned Lawn Area Network party.
Chat.zh: 小喷菇熟知各种最新的社交网络平台。他喜欢刷"Sporebook""ShroomedIn"以及"Fungigram"。但他有时候怀念在草坪上和大家一起上网时那种简简单单的陪伴。

BriefIntroduction.en: Short-range shooter, lasts for a limited time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 射程短，并且一段时间后消失

Introduction.en: Gloom Vines power individual shadow plants and shoot zombie-damaging gloom in eight directions.
Introduction.zh: 忧郁藤蔓使本格的暗影植物进入暗影状态。同时能向八个方向发射孢子，对僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: powers shadow plants within
Quickly sprays clouds of gloom around itself for 900 DPS

Chat.en: Gloom Vine's gloomy exterior shouldn't be seen as implying a gloomy interior. His interior is gloomy, but for complicated personal reasons that go way back.
Chat.zh: 忧郁藤蔓那幽暗的外观并不暗示他幽暗的内心。虽说他的内心确实很幽暗，但那是长久以来的个人原因导致的。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots in 8 directions
BriefIntroduction.zh: 攻击自身为中心的范围内的僵尸

Introduction.en: Vamporcinis are defensive plants that drain HP from surrounding zombies for a few seconds.
Introduction.zh: 吸血牛肝菌是从周围的僵尸吸取血量以强化自身的防御型植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: HP from zombies becomes her own toughness. Damage also pierces through armour.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 从僵尸吸取的血量用于增加自身血量

DESCRIPTION.en: Drains the health of zombies around her for another 12s at 55 DPS

Chat.en: "Zombie blood is like pizza, even when it's bad it's good!" - Vamporcini... probably.
Chat.zh: “僵尸的血就像是披萨，就算变质了也照样美味！”————吸血牛肝菌（……可能吧）

BriefIntroduction.en: Drains HP from surrounding zombies for a few seconds
BriefIntroduction.zh: 一段时间内吸收周围僵尸的血量

Introduction.en: Primal Potato Mines cost more than regular Potato Mines, but they arm more quickly and do damage over a larger area.
Introduction.zh: 原始土豆地雷比普通的土豆地雷消耗更多的阳光，但是他们更快准备完毕，并且造成伤害的范围更广。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, delayed activation
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，需要等待一段时间才能启动

DESCRIPTION.en: affects area around it
Spawns 2 clones of itself to diffent locations on the lawn

Chat.en: Primal Potato Mine doesn't consider himself to be primal. As far as he's concerned he's state-of-the-art. And who knows? Maybe he is.
Chat.zh: 原始土豆地雷并不觉得自己很原始，相反他认为自己是最先进的。谁知道呢？也许他真是。

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes and does medium area damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 爆炸范围更大的土豆地雷

Introduction.en: Cactus fires a penetrating thorn that can damage multiple enemies! Hides underground when zombies are close. Can pop balloon zombies.
Introduction.zh: 仙人掌发射能穿透击打多个目标的刺！在僵尸靠近时躲在地下。能直接扎破气球僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: hides and does ground damage when zombies are near
DESCRIPTION.zh: 躲在地下时会对经过的僵尸造成伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Thorns turn blue and permanently deals double damage (both ranged and melee)

Chat.en: Things have really changed for Cactus lately. Book deals, movies, truck show appearances... she's just trying to focus on staying humble and launching thorns like always.
Chat.zh: 仙人掌最近真的变了好多。买书、电影、卡车展……她现在只想努力保持低调，像以往一样发射一些刺。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires a penetrating thorn, hides for ground damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 射出穿透性的刺，僵尸靠近时缩进地里攻击

Introduction.en: Power Lilies create one Plant Food out of thin air.
Introduction.zh: 能量花凭空变出一颗叶绿素。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
creates one Plant Food

Chat.en: From seedling to sapling, to full grown foliage, Power Lily's experience as a life coach has shown her the best way to empower and support plants everywhere.
Chat.zh: 从种子到树苗，再到枝繁叶茂，能量花作为生命导师的经验足以成为她滋养其他植物的最好资本。

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates one Plant Food for use
BriefIntroduction.zh: 产生一个叶绿素

Introduction.en: Fire Gourds charge for a duration of time and fires flames ahead, dealing damage to zombies continuously and deal thrice the damage to armour and weapon stands.
Introduction.zh: 火葫芦蓄力后能朝前方吐火，造成持续火焰伤害，对付木制的兵器架特别有效。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
the longer he charges, the farther he torches
DESCRIPTION.zh: 蓄力时间越长，攻击距离越远

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches the entire lane ahead, dealing continous damage at 360 DPS for 5s

Chat.en: Fire Gourd used to be a sidekick in acrobatics class, but ever since he came to fight against zombies, he's found his true calling.
Chat.zh: 火葫芦原先只是个杂技班里的小配角, 但自从上了战场后, 他才发现自己真正的价值。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on it to breathe fire ahead
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击向前喷射火焰

Introduction.en: Fire Gourds specialize in dealing damage to armour and weapon stands, charging very quickly and being able to breathe flames ahead, dealing middling damage all the while.
Introduction.zh: 火葫芦蓄力后能朝前方吐火，造成持续火焰伤害，对付木制的兵器架特别有效。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
the longer he charges, the farther he torches
DESCRIPTION.zh: 蓄力时间越长，攻击距离越远

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches the entire lane ahead, dealing continous damage at 275 DPS for 5s

Chat.en: Fire Gourd used to be a sidekick in acrobatics class, but ever since he came to fight against zombies, he's found his true calling.
Chat.zh: 火葫芦原先只是个杂技班里的小配角, 但自从上了战场后, 他才发现自己真正的价值。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on it to breathe fire ahead
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击向前喷射火焰

Introduction.en: Fire Gourds charge for a duration of time and fires powerful flames ahead for a short time, dealing damage to zombies continuously and deal thrice the damage to armour and weapon stands.
Introduction.zh: 火葫芦蓄力后能朝前方吐火，造成持续火焰伤害，对付木制的兵器架特别有效。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
the longer he charges, the farther he torches
DESCRIPTION.zh: 蓄力时间越长，攻击距离越远

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches the entire lane ahead, dealing continous damage at 360 DPS for 7s

Chat.en: Fire Gourd used to be a sidekick in acrobatics class, but ever since he came to fight against zombies, he's found his true calling.
Chat.zh: 火葫芦原先只是个杂技班里的小配角, 但自从上了战场后, 他才发现自己真正的价值。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on it to breathe fire ahead
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击向前喷射火焰

Introduction.en: Coconut Cannons fire coconuts down a single lane, causing a medium explosion on impact.
Introduction.zh: 椰子加农炮沿着本行发射，炸裂时造成范围性伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
on impact, explodes in medium area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 击中目标时，在中等范围内爆炸

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a massive coconut fuse bomb, pushing all zombies back and dealing 2400 damage along with 1800 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Sure, he's a hairy old man, but Coconut Cannon can still fire on all cylinders. The reason he's so hairy: he's in-between waxings.
Chat.zh: 当然他已经是个长发老人，但是椰子加农炮仍然能用各种枪管发射。他之所以这么多毛发，是因为他还在接受蜜蜡除毛服务。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on the cannon to fire an explosive coconut
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击发射一颗爆炸性椰子炮弹

Introduction.en: Coconut Cannons fire coconuts down a single lane, causing a medium explosion on impact and dealing knockback.
Introduction.zh: 椰子加农炮沿着本行发射，炸裂时造成范围性伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
on impact, explodes in medium area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 击中目标时，在中等范围内爆炸

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a massive coconut fuse bomb, pushing all zombies back and dealing 2400 damage along with 1800 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Sure, he's a hairy old man, but Coconut Cannon can still fire on all cylinders. The reason he's so hairy: he's in-between waxings.
Chat.zh: 当然他已经是个长发老人，但是椰子加农炮仍然能用各种枪管发射。他之所以这么多毛发，是因为他还在接受蜜蜡除毛服务。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on the cannon to fire an explosive coconut
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击发射一颗爆炸性椰子炮弹

Introduction.en: Coconut Cannons fire coconuts down a single lane, causing a medium explosion on impact as well as splitting into damaging coconut pulp.
Introduction.zh: 椰子加农炮沿着本行发射，炸裂时造成范围性伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
on impact, explodes in medium area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 击中目标时，在中等范围内爆炸

DESCRIPTION.en: coconuts split into 5 pieces of coconut pulp upon contact, dealing damage and stun each
DESCRIPTION.zh: 椰子接触后会裂成5块椰肉，每块椰肉都会造成伤害并使目标眩晕

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a massive coconut bomb, pushing all zombies back and dealing 2400 damage along with 1800 damage in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: Sure, he's a hairy old man, but Coconut Cannon can still fire on all cylinders. The reason he's so hairy: he's in-between waxings.
Chat.zh: 当然他已经是个长发老人，但是椰子加农炮仍然能用各种枪管发射。他之所以这么多毛发，是因为他还在接受蜜蜡除毛服务。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on the cannon to fire an explosive coconut
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击发射一颗爆炸性椰子炮弹

Introduction.en: Pea Pods can be planted in the same space for up to 5 times the destruction.
Introduction.zh: 在同一格种植豌豆荚，能让他们的攻击力提升到至多 5 倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: increases damage output with multiple plantings
DESCRIPTION.zh: 多次种植，提高单次发射豌豆数量

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires 5 massive peas that each deal 900 damage with 300 splash in a 1x1 area

Chat.en: Having studied Quantum Spatial Mechanics in Clown College, Pea Pod has been amusing families of all ages.
Chat.zh: 自从毕业于职业小丑学院的空间量子力学专业，豌豆荚就一直在取悦家里的老小。

BriefIntroduction.en: Plant multiple times on the same spot to multiply damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 多次重叠种植提高攻击力

Introduction.en: Snapdragons breathe fire that causes damage in 6 adjacent tiles.
Introduction.zh: 火龙草向毗邻的 6 格吐出有伤害的火焰。

DESCRIPTION.en: damages all zombies in a 2x3 area ahead
DESCRIPTION.zh: 对前方2x3区域内的所有僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches a 3x3 area in front of it for 1800 damage

Chat.en: Although the most powerful dragon in the plant kingdom, he still dreams of wings and seeing the world beneath him.
Chat.zh: 就算他是植物王国里最强大的一条龙，他仍然希望有一对翅膀，俯瞰整个世界。

BriefIntroduction.en: Breathes fire in an area in front of it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向身前区域吐息

Introduction.en: Cold Snapdragons breathe icy mist into 6 adjacent tiles that both chills and damage zombies.
Introduction.zh: 冰龙草向毗邻的 6 格吐出能够减慢僵尸并造成伤害的冰雾。

DESCRIPTION.en: damages and chills all zombies in a 2x3 area ahead
DESCRIPTION.zh: 对前方2x3区域内的所有僵尸造成伤害并使其减速。

DESCRIPTION.en: Freezes the 3x3 area in front of it for 1200 damage

Chat.en: Cold Snapdragon gets chilly when anyone brings up his cousin Snapdragon. "We just view temperature very differently, and I'd really rather not discuss it," he says. Yikes.
Chat.zh: 当有人提起他的堂兄火龙草时，冰龙草就会变得冷酷无情。他说：“我们对温度的看法很不一样，而且我真的不想讨论这个问题。”真是的。

BriefIntroduction.en: Breaths icy mist in an area in front of it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向身前区域吐出冰雾

Introduction.en: Snap Peas dive underground, burrow towards zombies, then pop up underneath to swallow them in one gulp. Snap Peas then return to their starting spot, chew on the entire matter for a while, and finally spit the zombies' heads out at attackers.
Introduction.zh: “我承认，我吃东西挺挑剔的，”大嘴豌豆随口承认道。“吃个僵尸没问题，但就是觉得脑袋这东西吧……总感觉它们在看着我。”

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots peas instead if a target can't be devoured
DESCRIPTION.zh: 如果目标无法被吞噬，则发射豌豆代替。

DESCRIPTION.en: must chew for 14s before spitting out the head
DESCRIPTION.zh: 必须咀嚼14秒后才能吐出头部

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly eats 6 zombies near it and shoots out their heads

Chat.en: "I'm a picky eater, I'll admit it," admits Snap Pea casually. "I'll eat a zombie, no problem, but there's just something about heads. I feel like they're staring at me."
Chat.zh: 当有人提起他的堂兄火龙草时，冰龙草就会变得冷酷无情。他说：“我们对温度的看法很不一样，而且我真的不想讨论这个问题。”真是的。

BriefIntroduction.en: Burrows and eats zombies, then chews and spits out their heads
BriefIntroduction.zh: 挖洞吞食僵尸，然后咀嚼并吐出它们的头颅。

Introduction.en: Gatling Peas fire 4 peas at one time.
Introduction.zh: 机枪射手每次发射 4 豌豆，并且拥有更高的射速。

DESCRIPTION.en: 4x
Shoots a massive onslaught of 60 fire, plasma, and normal peas in 3 lanes

Chat.en: During a certain explosion at a research center, a reed was thunderstruck and became Lightning Reed. Meanwhile, a Repeater on a gatling was also zapped, that's the origin of our new plant hero, Gatling Pea.
Chat.zh: 某次研究中心的爆炸事故发生时，一棵芦苇刚好被闪电击中，于是他变成了闪电芦苇；而与此同时，正在操作机枪的豌豆射手也被击中，这就是我们全新的超级英雄————机枪豌豆的来历。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots 4 peas at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向敌人发射 4 颗豌豆

Introduction.en: Gatling Peas fire 4 peas at one time at a significantly shorter shooting rate.
Introduction.zh: 机枪射手每次发射 4 豌豆，并且拥有更高的射速。

DESCRIPTION.en: 4x
Shoots a massive onslaught of 60 fire and plasma in 3 lanes

Chat.en: During a certain explosion at a research center, a reed was thunderstruck and became Lightning Reed. Meanwhile, a Repeater on a gatling was also zapped, that's the origin of our new plant hero, Gatling Pea.
Chat.zh: 某次研究中心的爆炸事故发生时，一棵芦苇刚好被闪电击中，于是他变成了闪电芦苇；而与此同时，正在操作机枪的豌豆射手也被击中，这就是我们全新的超级英雄————机枪豌豆的来历。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots 4 peas at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向敌人发射 4 颗豌豆

Introduction.en: Gatling Peas fire 4 peas at one time at a slightly shorter shooting rate. They're equipped with 3 machine guns that shoot more peas into other lanes.
Introduction.zh: 机枪射手每次发射 4 豌豆，并且拥有更高的射速。

DESCRIPTION.en: 4x
Spawns with machine guns that shoot more peas at different angles
Shoots a massive onslaught of 80 fire and plasma peas in 3 lanes

Chat.en: During a certain explosion at a research center, a reed was thunderstruck and became Lightning Reed. Meanwhile, a Repeater on a gatling was also zapped, that's the origin of our new plant hero, Gatling Pea.
Chat.zh: 某次研究中心的爆炸事故发生时，一棵芦苇刚好被闪电击中，于是他变成了闪电芦苇；而与此同时，正在操作机枪的豌豆射手也被击中，这就是我们全新的超级英雄————机枪豌豆的来历。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots 4 peas at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向敌人发射 4 颗豌豆

Introduction.en: Split Peas shoot peas forward and backwards.
Introduction.zh: 裂荚射手向前后方发射豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots slightly faster than Peashooter
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向前方正常，向后方两倍

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of 90 peas in both directions, with the back head shooting a massive pea at the end for 900 damage

Chat.en: "It's my turn with the eyebrows," said Frontie. "Fine, we'll split them," said Backie. Sprouted two minutes apart, their eyebrow war is eternal.
Chat.zh: “该让我戴眉毛了！”前面的头说道。“好吧，那我们平分一下。”后面的头回答道。只是分开了两分钟，他们的眉毛争夺战就到达了无法停歇的地步。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots peas forward and backward
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向身前和身后发射豌豆

Introduction.en: Chili Beans deliver a crippling bout of gastrointestinal distress.
Introduction.zh: 巴豆会对吞食他的敌人施加致命的毒素攻击，并使其释放眩晕气体。

DESCRIPTION.en: on being eaten
eating zombie is destroyed and releases stunning gas
