DESCRIPTION.zh: 吃掉他的僵尸直接死亡，并且释放眩晕气体

DESCRIPTION.en: Spawns 4 clones of itself to different locations on the lawn

Chat.en: He's not blushing, he's trying to hold it in.
Chat.zh: 他不是脸红了，而是一直在憋着什么。

BriefIntroduction.en: Zombies that eat it are defeated and release gas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 僵尸吃下后死亡并释放眩晕气体

Introduction.en: Tall-nuts are heavy-duty wall plants that block low flying zombies.
Introduction.zh: 高坚果是血量更厚的坚果墙，可以抵挡低空飞行的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: blocks launched imps and stops any tile-moving zombies like Fisherman and Qigong
Gains metal armour that adds 6000 extra toughness

Chat.en: Tall-nut is opening a chain of stores for Tall and Taller gentlemen. "I'll shell out the savings to ya!"
Chat.zh: 高坚果打算为高个子的绅士们开张连锁店，“我会把我的存货特价卖给大家！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Heavy-duty wall that blocks low-flying and tile-moving zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 血量更高的坚果墙，可以抵挡飞来的僵尸

Introduction.en: Hurrikales push back all zombies in their lane with a chilling wind.
Introduction.zh: 飓风甘蓝利用强风将本行所有的僵尸向后推。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
chills affected zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 对吹到的僵尸施加冷冻效果

DESCRIPTION.en: blows away flying zombies in its lane
DESCRIPTION.zh: 吹飞本行所有的飞行僵尸

Chat.en: You could say Hurrikale is a "blow hard" in the truest sense of the phrase. He is the first chair trombonist in the Biennial Philharmonic Orchestra. He is also proficient in the trumpet, saxophone and the tuba. But man o' man, you should really see him on the flugelhorn. Dude absolutely kills it.
Chat.zh: 用“吹牛大师”形容飓风甘蓝再合适不过了，当然是字面意义上的。他在两年一次的交响乐演奏会上可是首席吹号手。他也精通小号、萨克斯、大号。但是最令人震撼的是他会吹粗管短号！这家伙真是酷毙了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Blows a chilling wind that pushes back zombies in lane
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吹出强寒风，推动本行的僵尸

Introduction.en: Stallias slow down zombies with a puff of perfume.
Introduction.zh: 大丽菊利用一股毒气减慢僵尸的前进。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates when zombie is close
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，僵尸靠近时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: slows zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 对附近的僵尸施加减速效果

DESCRIPTION.en: Slows all zombies on the lawn for 45s

Chat.en: "Life moves too quickly in our modern world," says Stallia. "Folks need to slow down and smell some spores."
Chat.zh: “现在大家都总是忙忙碌碌的，”大丽菊说，“人们应该时不时停下脚步闻闻花香。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Slows zombies in nearby lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 减慢范围内的所有僵尸

Introduction.en: Electric Peashooters fire pea-like orbs that pass through zombies and crackle with electrical power, doing damage all the while.
Introduction.zh: 电能豌豆向僵尸发射穿透性球状闪电，并且伴随着电弧产生，对附近的目标造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Discharges 5 big electric peas that deal 1200 damage upon contact, splitting into multiple smaller ones that deal 240 damage each

Chat.en: Electric Peashooter expects resistance, but he doesn't want to ohm anybody.
Chat.zh: 电能豌豆希望遇到一个电阻相当的对手，但是他又不想跟他们一起算欧姆定律。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires electric peas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射电能豌豆子弹

Introduction.en: Electric Peashooters fire pea-like orbs that pass through and chain to many zombies and crackle with electrical power, doing damage all the while.
Introduction.zh: 电能豌豆向僵尸发射穿透性球状闪电，并且伴随着电弧产生，对附近的目标造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Discharges 5 big electric peas that deal 1200 damage upon contact, splitting into multiple smaller ones that deal 240 damage each

Chat.en: Electric Peashooter expects resistance, but he doesn't want to ohm anybody.
Chat.zh: 电能豌豆希望遇到一个电阻相当的对手，但是他又不想跟他们一起算欧姆定律。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires electric peas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射电能豌豆子弹

Introduction.en: Electric Peashooters snipe fast, pea-like orbs that pass through and chain to zombies and crackle with high electrical power that deals light armor-piercing damage, dealing massive damage.
Introduction.zh: 电能豌豆向僵尸发射穿透性球状闪电，并且伴随着电弧产生，对附近的目标造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Discharges 5 big electric peas that deal 1200 damage upon contact, splitting into multiple smaller ones that deal 240 damage each

Chat.en: Electric Peashooter expects resistance, but he doesn't want to ohm anybody.
Chat.zh: 电能豌豆希望遇到一个电阻相当的对手，但是他又不想跟他们一起算欧姆定律。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires electric peas
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射电能豌豆子弹

Introduction.en: Squashes will smash the first zombie that gets close.
Introduction.zh: 倭瓜会砸向第一只向他靠近的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: all zombies around target
Jumps to 3 different zombies and squashes them

Chat.en: Squash is actually his stage name. His birth name was Tracy.
Chat.zh: “倭瓜”其实是他的艺名，他的本名其实是“特雷西”。

BriefIntroduction.en: Squashes zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 碾压一群僵尸

Introduction.en: Gloom Shrooms shoot zombie-damaging gloom in eight directions. When powered and shooting, they power near by shadow plants.
Introduction.zh: 忧郁菇向八个方向发射孢子，对僵尸造成伤害。在发射时如果被激活，也会激活附近的暗影植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: powers shadow plants in an area when shooting
DESCRIPTION.zh: 攻击时激活范围内的暗影植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Drags zombie near himself and shrouds its vicinity with fumes for 1200 DPS

Chat.en: Some see him as depressed, but he's got a lot of sides.
Chat.zh: 很多人觉得他很忧郁，但实际上他有很多副面孔。

BriefIntroduction.en: Damages all zombies in a 3x3 area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 对 3x3 范围内所有僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Magnifying Grass turns sun into a bolt of colorful damage.
Introduction.zh: 棱镜草将阳光转换为高能的彩虹子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to spend sun for an attack
Shine Vine can make it shoot a rainbow bolt on its own every 12s
DESCRIPTION.zh: 闪耀藤蔓可以让植物每 12 秒自行发射一束箭。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a rainbow sun beam that deals 400 DPS, plantfood duration is extended by 0.4s for each Enlighten-Mint plant on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 叶绿素除了闪耀藤蔓之外，草坪上每种植一株启迪薄荷，持续时间延长0.4秒。

Chat.en: Magnifying Grass understands the inherent power of a rainbow. Beneath her stoic features she takes great joy in delivering radiant multicolored destruction to the zombie horde.
Chat.zh: 棱镜草知道如何运用隐藏在彩虹中的无穷能量。在她冷峻的面孔下，驱动五彩缤纷的辐射对抗僵尸大军使她获得巨大的享受与满足。

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap to spend sun for a powerful attack
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击后，花费阳光发射光能子弹

Introduction.en: Celery Stalkers wait until zombies pass, then pop up and bash them from behind.
Introduction.zh: 潜伏芹菜会等待僵尸走过，在他们走到身后时冒出并抽打他们。

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons 2 clones at random positions on the lawn

Chat.en: Celery Stalker resents the implication that there's anything unsavory about his attack style. He simply believes that discretion is the better part of vegetation.
Chat.zh: 潜伏芹菜非常讨厌别人说他的攻击方式没特色。他觉得保持低调对植物来说更重要。

BriefIntroduction.en: Pops up and bashes zombies from behind
BriefIntroduction.zh: 身后有僵尸时冒出并造成伤害

Introduction.en: Sap-flings create zombie-slowing puddles of sap.
Introduction.zh: 树脂投手会在地上留下能让僵尸减速的树脂。

DESCRIPTION.en: does little damage on impact, but creates a sap puddle
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会造成伤害，但是子弹爆裂时在地上留下树脂

DESCRIPTION.en: slows zombies who walk in puddle
DESCRIPTION.zh: 走在树脂上的僵尸会被减速

DESCRIPTION.en: Flings sappy pinecones all over, encasing the lawn in sap

Chat.en: You've gotta see Sap-fling's throwing stem to believe it. He may be young, but everyone agrees ... the kid's got TALENT. Scouts from some of the biggest Pinecone Ball teams have been keeping a close eye on him. He could be headed to the majors. Oh sure, some knock him for his incredibly sticky spitball. But he only uses all-natural and non-artificial flavoured sap, so it's entirely tournament legal.
Chat.zh: 不看树脂投手的手臂都不会觉得他年轻而且有不可否认的才华。一些知名的的 Pinecone Ball 球队的球探一直在密切关注他。他可能会去参加大满贯赛。哦，当然，有些人因为他老是丢出黏糊糊的球而觉得他在作弊。但他只使用全天然的汁液，所以这是完全合法的。

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates zombies-slowing puddles of sap
BriefIntroduction.zh: 投掷释放树脂的子弹，使僵尸减速

Introduction.en: Parsnips snip at zombies, then charge down the lane at the last moment.
Introduction.zh: 防风草掐伤身前的僵尸，被啃咬后冲出夹击本行前方的僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: charges down the lane when defeated and snips zombies in front
DESCRIPTION.zh: 被啃食完毕后沿着本行冲出，掐前方的僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: Summons 2 minature versions of itself that snips down the lane

Chat.en: "Snip!" said Parsnip. "Snip snip snip! If it wasn't for my scrapbook, my coupons, and snipping zombies to death, I just don't know what I'd do with myself!"
Chat.zh: “我掐！”防风草叫道。“我掐我掐我掐！要不是为了制作我的剪贴簿、抢我的优惠券，还有掐死僵尸，我都不知道拿自己怎么办！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Snips zombies, than charges down lane
BriefIntroduction.zh: 夹击僵尸，被啃咬时冲出并攻击前方所有僵尸

Introduction.en: Explode-O-Nuts provide protection, and when their shells are eaten, they explode to blow up zombies.
Introduction.zh: 爆炸坚果保护身后的植物，当他们被吃掉时，炸死周围的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Gains a layer of metal of 4000 toughness that causes an explosion upon being eaten

Chat.en: "My only regret," says Explode-O-Nut, "is that I have but one chewy center full of nitroglycerin to give in defense of this lawn."
Chat.zh: “唯一令我遗憾的是，”爆炸坚果说道，“我只有一颗能被咬爆的硝酸甘油核心。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes when eaten
BriefIntroduction.zh: 被啃食后爆炸

Introduction.en: Grapeshots explode and scatter bouncing projectiles in eight directions.
Introduction.zh: 爆裂葡萄爆炸后向 8 个方向发射弹性葡萄子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: "Spa-BOOM!" enthuses Grapeshot. "You liked that? I got a million of 'em! Wa-POW! Buh-BLAM! Za-... um... Ker-... hmmm... Okay, I guess I've only got the three."
Chat.zh: “唏——啪——！”爆裂葡萄激情地吼道。“你喜欢吗？我还有上万种这样的声音呢。哇——噗——！啪——砰——！咂——……！额……，轰——……！嗯嗯……，好吧，我想就这三种了。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes and scatters bouncing projectiles
BriefIntroduction.zh: 爆炸并发射弹射子弹

Introduction.en: Planterns remove fog and reveal invisible zombies.
Introduction.zh: 路灯花会驱散迷雾，并使隐形的僵尸显现。

DESCRIPTION.en: zombies that're destroyed near it drop 25 sun
defogs and reveals invisible zombies in a 3x3 area
warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Renders all surrounding plants in a 3x3 area invisible

Chat.en: Plantern does his job according to his past experiences. "Why not do exactly what the zombies did in the past?"
Chat.zh: 路灯花根据以往的工作经验恪尽职守，“僵尸以前也喜欢隐藏他们自己，难道我们不能也这么干嘛。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Removes fog and reveals invisible zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 驱散迷雾，并显示隐形的僵尸

Introduction.en: Lantern Cherries clears fog around itself.
Introduction.zh: 灯笼草驱散中等范围内的迷雾。

DESCRIPTION.en: removes fog created by Arbiter-Model X
warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Illuminates and permanently removes all of the fog in a 5x5 area

Chat.en: Lantern Cherry soon became inseparable friends with Torchwood and Snapdragon, dubbing themselves the "Three Musketeers of Flame". However, the Tiki lounge has grown to be hesistant on serving them, as they don't want to buy any more tables to replace the scorched ones.
Chat.zh: 灯笼草很快就与火炬树桩和火龙草成了形影不离的好朋友，他们自称为“火焰三剑客”。不过夏威夷风情酒廊似乎不太敢招待他们三个，老板可不愿意再看见烧焦的酒桌。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Removes fog and reveals invisible zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 驱散迷雾，并显示隐形的僵尸

Introduction.en: Heavenly Peaches heal all surrounding plants, regaining their health.
Introduction.zh: 仙桃医治周围的植物，恢复他们的生命值。

DESCRIPTION.en: Grants invincibility to herself and all plants around her in a 3x3 area for 10s

Chat.en: Her resume says that she was once a peach of Wangmu Niangniang for consumption, and became a medic after being demoted to mortal.
Chat.zh: 仙桃的简历上写着自己本是王母娘娘的御用幡桃, 被贬下凡后做了战地医生。

BriefIntroduction.en: Heals plants in a 3x3 area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 治疗 3x3 范围内的植物

Introduction.en: Jack O' Lanterns spray fire down a lane, doing extensive burning damage over a short distance.
Introduction.zh: 杰克南瓜向本行前方喷射火焰，对短距离内的敌人造成灼烧伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: fire recharges over time
Summons 10 Wil-O'-Wisps on the lawn that deal 300 DPS

Chat.en: "Boo! Mwah-ha-ha-haaaaah," opines Jack O' Lantern. Oh, yes. Things and stuff are scheduled to be seriously spooky when he's around. Count on it.
Chat.zh: “唔！！！呜哈哈哈！”杰克南瓜又开始吓大家。是的，当他在身边的时候，你就应该时刻做好被惊吓的准备了。好好期待一下吧。

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires jets of flame over a short distance
BriefIntroduction.zh: 短距离内喷射火焰攻击

Introduction.en: Pyre Vines can be planted on top of other plants to provide protection from cold plus an additional close range flame attack.
Introduction.zh: 柴火藤蔓可以被种植在其他植物上，使本格的植物免受寒冻，对短距离内的敌人造成灼烧伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Torches the entire lane it is in, dealing 60 DPS and melting any frozen plants

Chat.en: Pyre Vine considers his holdings, his fortune, his vast hoard of wealth. He feels it should please him, and yet nevertheless he is anxious and fearful.
Chat.zh: 柴火藤蔓审视着他的地产、财富和庞大的宝库。他觉得这些理应让自己满足，然而他依然感到焦虑和恐惧。

BriefIntroduction.en: Warms and flames
BriefIntroduction.zh: 温暖四周并喷火

Introduction.en: Dandelions send explosive seeds down three different lanes, one lane at a time.
Introduction.zh: 蒲公英向身前的三行中的一行发射爆炸性蒲公英子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: can attack targets in the lane above or below
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以打击上下行和本行的目标

DESCRIPTION.en: reacts to certain strong winds, blowing all of its seeds before needing to recharge
DESCRIPTION.zh: 与Blover发生反应，在需要充能之前会吹散它所有的种子。

DESCRIPTION.en: Ejects several dandelion seeds into the air, landing and causing explosions all over the lawn for 450 damage per seed

Chat.en: "Look," says Dandelion, shaking his head, "I'm not a leprechaun and I'm not a genie. You can blow my seeds off all you want, but I can't make your wish come true. I don't even know how that rumor got started."
Chat.zh: “看，”蒲公英摇摇头说，“我才不是什么小妖精或者小精灵。要是想的话，你还可以把我的种子都吹飞，但是我就是不能实现你的愿望。我也不知道这些传闻是谁发起的。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Attacks multiple lanes, one lane at a time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 攻击邻近行的僵尸

Introduction.en: Chard Guards are defensive blockers that can hurl zombies backwards.
Introduction.zh: 甜菜护卫利用坚韧的身躯和菜叶将僵尸击退。

DESCRIPTION.en: Leaves can be healed by Heavenly Peach without taking bite damage unlike Aloe
Quickly knocks back all the zombies in its and adjacent lanes

Chat.en: You might remember Chard Guard from his days in the WWF (that's World Wrestling Foliage). When he was in the ring - boy-oh-boy - he was something to behold! His moves! His style! His attitude! The crowd loved him. He was quite the star for a while there. Sure, those days are behind him. But if you watch carefully, when Chard Guard is fighting zombies, you'll see him use the wrestling move he made famous. The ol' Knock 'Em Dead maneuver - it gets 'em every time.
Chat.zh: 你也许还记得WWF里（世界蔬叶摔角大赛）甜菜护卫的闪光时刻。当时他获得“男仔中的男仔”金腰带，那真的是嗨翻全场，万众瞩目！他的动作！他的战风！他的气势！大家爱死他了。那个时候他确实是人气明星。当然，那也已经是之前的事情了。但是如今如果你仔细观察，当甜菜护卫和僵尸战斗的时候，你会看到他使用的正是看家招式————摔跤动作。称之为“一击入魂”的秘技……真是百用百中。

BriefIntroduction.en: Blocks and hurls zombies backwards
BriefIntroduction.zh: 阻挡并击退僵尸

Introduction.en: When zombies eat Hypno-shrooms, they will turn around and fight for you.
Introduction.zh: 当僵尸吃掉了魅惑菇，他们将会转身为你战斗。

DESCRIPTION.en: on being eaten
can't be eaten by chickens, turkeys, or weasels
hypnotized zombies have 25% damage resistance
Becomes enchanted and glows, turning any zombie that eats it into a mighty hypnotized gargantuar

Chat.en: Hypno-shroom has no trouble persuading zombies to fight on behalf of the plants. But he has yet to convince one to cluck like a chicken. "One day," he says. "One day."
Chat.zh: 魅惑菇很擅长洗脑僵尸作为一个植物去战斗。但是他还没做到说服谁去学鸡叫。“总有一天会的，”他解释道，“总有一天。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Makes a zombie fight for you
BriefIntroduction.zh: 让一名僵尸为你战斗

Introduction.en: Electric Currants create electrical fences between ones planted on the same row or column.
Introduction.zh: 相同行或列的电流醋栗之间会产生电流线。

DESCRIPTION.en: area effect (electric fence)
knocks zombies back into other lanes when defeated
DESCRIPTION.zh: 被打败时把僵尸击退至其他行

DESCRIPTION.en: Becomes energized and electrified, making any electrical fences connected to him deal double damage

Chat.en: "Electricity is all very well and fine as a phenomenon," says Electric Currant, "but electromagnetism as a whole is where it's really at."
Chat.zh: “闪电永远是最棒的自然现象，”电流醋栗说道，“但是电磁学这个整体才是它的灵魂所在。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates electric fences
BriefIntroduction.zh: 链接电弧对僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Escape Roots can swap locations with different plants, and turns into an explosive on contact when armed.
Introduction.zh: 逃脱树根在接触敌人时爆炸，他可以和其他处境危险的植物交换位置。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap Escape Root and another plant to swap them. This will also arm Escape Root.
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击逃脱树根后，再点击另一株植物来交换位置

DESCRIPTION.en: can act as a temporary wall when unarmed
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击逃脱树根后，再点击另一株植物来交换位置

DESCRIPTION.en: Digs into the ground and pops up into 3 different locations on the lawn, turning into any of its explosives

Chat.en: The other plants put on a big surprise party for Escape Root last week, but he did his thing and suddenly it was a surprise party...FOR THEM!
Chat.zh: 上个星期其他植物为逃脱树根举办了一个盛大的惊喜派对，逃脱树根开始玩起了他最擅长的事情，派对的惊喜一下就转移给了大家。

BriefIntroduction.en: Explodes and can be swapped with other plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 能与其他植物换位，遇到僵尸时爆炸

Introduction.en: Imitaters imitate a chosen plant, let you use two of the same plant during a level!
Introduction.zh: 模仿者允许你同一个关卡携带两张相同的植物卡片！

DESCRIPTION.en: can imitate any other non-mint plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以模仿其他非薄荷类植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Lets you use Imitater by itself, turning into any plant when placed

Chat.en: Having studied French Theater at Julienne, the Imitater went to the streets with his art, and has perfected his technique he calls "Potato stuck in a box".
Chat.zh: 模仿者在法国进修过表演艺术，在街头表演中完善了他的最新节目“关在盒子里的茄子”。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lets you have two of the same plant
BriefIntroduction.zh: 允许你同时选取两张相同的卡片

Introduction.en: Shadow-shrooms poison zombies who touch them, inflicting damage over time.
Introduction.zh: 毒影菇接触到僵尸时，对其施加毒性效果，中毒僵尸一段时间内持续受到伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, on contact
powered Shadow-shrooms make poisoned zombies poison other zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影状态下，使僵尸身上的毒有传染性

DESCRIPTION.en: Poisos every zombie on the lawn for 30 DPS

Chat.en: Despite being such a poisonous and profoundly inedible fungus, Shadow-shroom is nonetheless a total cutie-pie.
Chat.zh: 尽管毒影菇是一种有毒且不容易食用的真菌，但他仍然是一道美味的食物。

BriefIntroduction.en: Poisons zombies over time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使僵尸获得一段时间的中毒效果

Introduction.en: Magnet-shrooms remove helmets and other metal objects from zombies.
Introduction.zh: 磁力菇会吸走僵尸的金属盔甲和其他金属物品。

DESCRIPTION.en: removes metal objects from zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 吸走僵尸身上的金属物品

DESCRIPTION.en: Attracts all metal objects as well as Excavator shovels on the lawn, flinging them in its lane for 450 damage per metal object

Chat.en: Despite his unusual appearance, Magnet-shroom doesn't have a problem attracting girlfriends. But he does have a problem keeping them. It's the same thing every time. In the end, they always find him too clingy.
Chat.zh: 虽然磁力菇外形奇特，但是对找女朋友完全没有影响。可真谈了恋爱却都维持不长，每个姑娘都因为同一个理由和他分手：他太粘人了！

BriefIntroduction.en: Removes helmets and other metal objects from zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吸走僵尸身上的金属盔甲和其他金属物品

Introduction.en: Resistant Radish stands firm and resists the magic from Qigong Zombies and Black Holes' suction.
Introduction.zh: 白萝卜稳固地立在地上，抵抗气功僵尸的法术和时空黑洞的吞噬。

DESCRIPTION.en: protects plants from magical suctions
DESCRIPTION.zh: 防止身后植物被法术抽吸

Chat.en: Resistant Radish has studied qigong for many years, but he only learned one thing: stasis.
Chat.zh: 白萝卜学了很多年气功, 但他一直都只会一招: 纹丝不动。

BriefIntroduction.en: Stands firm and resists the magic from Qigong Zombies and Black Holes' suction
BriefIntroduction.zh: 稳固地立在地上，抵抗气功僵尸的法术和时空黑洞的吞噬

Introduction.en: E.M.Peaches explode and disable all machines in an area.
Introduction.zh: 脉冲黄桃爆炸后使范围内的所有机器陷入故障。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
disables machines

Chat.en: E.M.Peach has grown tired of people lazily calling him E.M.Pea. "There's a C and H there for a reason people! And I've got the stone to prove it!"
Chat.zh: 脉冲黄桃逐渐厌烦别人将他简称为“脉冲”。“我的名字里有‘黄桃’两字是有原因的好吗？而且这根本显而易见！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Disables all machines in an area
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使范围内所有的机械僵尸陷入故障

Introduction.en: Citrons shoot powerful balls of plasma.
Introduction.zh: 充能柚子向敌人发射高能的等离子子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires a powerful electric orb that flies through the lane, tossing any zombie in its path off the lawn and only stopping at gargs and mechs for 3600 damage and 900 splash in a 3x3 area

Chat.en: As the CEO and primary user of "Vitamin C-U-Later" 20-hour energy shots, Citron is always on and always ready for action. "Let's make this happen!!"
Chat.zh: 作为“再会，维生素”能量饮料的发明者和首位品尝者，充能柚子始终保持着精神，并时刻准备行动。“那就再来点维生素！！”

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots powerful balls of plasma
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射高能的等离子子弹

Introduction.en: Laser Beans fire down a lane, hitting all zombies ahead of it.
Introduction.zh: 激光豆向整条路线发射，打击他前面的所有僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: all zombies in a lane, pierces infinitely
Jets out a massive laser beam that flies down the lane, dealing 1800 damage to every target in its path

Chat.en: After a laser eye surgery had gone horribly right, Laser Bean gained a sense of purpose and a new-found affinity for competitive staring contests as well as performing laser beams towards the onslaught.
Chat.zh: 经过了激光眼科手术后，他获得了不可思议的能力。现在激光豆拥有了强大的能量，以及不眨眼游戏中的压倒性实力。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots a laser that pierces through zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射穿透僵尸的激光

Introduction.en: Solar Tomatoes stun zombies in a 3x3 area, causing each zombie to drop 50 sun.
Introduction.zh: 阳光番茄使 3x3 范围内僵尸眩晕，并使每只僵尸掉落 50 阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en:
Solar Tomato wishes folks would just stop and enjoy the sunshine sometimes.
"Stop," she says. "Enjoy the sunshine. I said stop! Hold it right there! Don't move! I MEAN IT!!!"
Chat.zh:
阳光番茄希望忙碌的人们时常停下来享受阳光。
“停下！”她叫嚷道，“享受一下阳光！我说了给我停下来！不许动！别动！我认真的！！！”。

BriefIntroduction.en: Stuns zombies into dropping suns
BriefIntroduction.zh: 令僵尸眩晕，并使之掉落阳光

Introduction.en: Tile Turnips create a Power Tile on planting.
Introduction.zh: 瓷砖萝卜会在原地产生一块强化瓷砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: DJ Tile Turnip changed dance floors with his underground hit "Turnip the Beet." What's his latest mix? When he lays it down, you'll feel the power.
Chat.zh: 播音员瓷砖萝卜的代表作《根着萝卜蹦！》逐渐在地下舞厅流行。他最新的作品是什么呢？他发布出来后，你保证会兴奋到开大的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates a Power Tile
BriefIntroduction.zh: 放置一块强化瓷砖

Introduction.en: Tile Turnips create a Power Tile on planting.
Introduction.zh: 瓷砖萝卜会在原地产生一块强化瓷砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: DJ Tile Turnip changed dance floors with his underground hit "Turnip the Beet." What's his latest mix? When he lays it down, you'll feel the power.
Chat.zh: 播音员瓷砖萝卜的代表作《根着萝卜蹦！》逐渐在地下舞厅流行。他最新的作品是什么呢？他发布出来后，你保证会兴奋到开大的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates a Power Tile
BriefIntroduction.zh: 放置一块强化瓷砖

Introduction.en: Tile Turnips create a Power Tile on planting.
Introduction.zh: 瓷砖萝卜会在原地产生一块强化瓷砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: DJ Tile Turnip changed dance floors with his underground hit "Turnip the Beet." What's his latest mix? When he lays it down, you'll feel the power.
Chat.zh: 播音员瓷砖萝卜的代表作《根着萝卜蹦！》逐渐在地下舞厅流行。他最新的作品是什么呢？他发布出来后，你保证会兴奋到开大的！

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates a Power Tile
BriefIntroduction.zh: 放置一块强化瓷砖

Introduction.en: Waturnips create shallow water puddles on planting.
Introduction.zh: 瓷砖萝卜会在原地产生一块强化瓷砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
puddles cannot be removed upon planting
can be used to place aquatic-only plants on top
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可用于放置仅限水生植物。

Chat.en: As a prank, Waturnip placed a taco on his head and sat in the water, curious if Dave could swim. Who could've POSSIBLY knew that Dave actually took Lily Pad's swimming lessons?!
Chat.zh: 为了恶作剧，水萝卜把一个墨西哥卷饼放在戴夫头上，然后坐在水里，好奇戴夫会不会游泳。谁能想到，戴夫竟然真的上了莉莉帕德的游泳课？！

Introduction.zh: 瓷砖萝卜会在原地产生一块强化瓷砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant

Chat.en: DJ Tile Turnip changed dance floors with his underground hit "Turnip the Beet." What's his latest mix? When he lays it down, you'll feel the power.
Chat.zh: 播音员瓷砖萝卜的代表作《根着萝卜蹦！》逐渐在地下舞厅流行。他最新的作品是什么呢？他发布出来后，你保证会兴奋到开大的！

DESCRIPTION.en: regenerates health over time
Fully regenerates and creates a force-field that spans the entire column, being able to absorb 10000 damage

Chat.en: As a young nut, he spent way too much time standing between two mirrors and trying to look into infinity.
Chat.zh: 作为一颗年轻的坚果，他花了太多时间站在两个平行的镜子之间，尝试看到无数个自己。

Its recharge time is reduced to 0

Chat.en: Marigold used to dedicate herself to the Zen lifestyle. She was a team player, and gave it her best there in the garden. But when she heard needed to confront zombies on the lawn again, she said she'd prepared for that!
Chat.zh: 金盏花曾沉浸生活在禅境花园中。她在那表现得很棒，在花园中尽己所能。当她听到了自己又要面对草坪上的僵尸时，她表示早已做好准备！

Introduction.zh: 苹果迫击炮向邻近三行发射有轻微眩晕效果的苹果核子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Deploys a large apple core at every zombie on the lawn, dealing 360 damage and stunning for 4s per apple

Chat.en: Apple Mortar blasts and explodes three zombies dead in their tracks. SPAF! That'll show 'em! That'll show ALL of them!
Chat.zh: 苹果迫击炮让三个僵尸死死的定在原地。啪！这就是杀鸡儆猴！让别的僵尸好好看清楚我的威力！

Introduction.en: Red Stingers fire shots at full force when close to home, and become more defensive further from it.
Introduction.zh: 红针花靠近草坪左侧时集中火力发射子弹，远离则会提升防御力，降低火力。

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires a beam down the lane, slowing zombies down and dealing 200 DPS for 8s

Chat.en: Flexibility is of key importance to Red Stinger. "I do stretching exercises every morning," he says. "It's important to stay physically and mentally nimble."
Chat.zh: 柔韧性对于红针花来说是非常重要的。“我每天早上都作拉伸练习，”他说。“这对精神与肉体时刻保持灵敏反应十分重要。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Fires shots at full force when close to home and becomes more defensive further from it
BriefIntroduction.zh: 离草坪左侧越远，攻击力越低，同时防御力越高

Introduction.en: Skyshooters shoot peas at attacking zombies. They can be planted in the sky.
Introduction.zh: 飞行射手以更快的速度在空中向僵尸发射豌豆。

DESCRIPTION.en: could be planted in the sky and on water
Shoots a barrage of 75 knockbacking sky peas

Chat.en: The youngest Peashooter ever to earn a pilot's license. Also the only Peashooter ever to earn a pilot's license.
Chat.zh: 在豌豆射手中，他是最年轻就考得飞机驾驶证的那一位，也是唯一的一位。

BriefIntroduction.en: Flying shooters that shoot peas at the enemy at a higher speed
BriefIntroduction.zh: 更快地向僵尸发射豌豆，能在空中飞行

Introduction.en: Sun Beans infect zombies with sun. As a zombie takes damage it generates sun.
Introduction.zh: 阳光豆给僵尸施予阳光。当这只僵尸受伤时产生阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: Starts glowing, instantly killing the zombie that eats it and causing it to produce sun based on its HP

Chat.en: As the eldest of the four bean brothers, Sun Bean often finds his siblings exasperating. Chili Bean is a little crude, Laser Bean is too far out, and Spring Bean is just plain lazy. Still, he loves them just the same. That's how it is with family.
Chat.zh: 作为豆子兄弟里的老大哥，阳光豆总觉得他的弟弟妹妹们不靠谱。巴豆总是很粗俗，激光豆太前卫，弹簧豆就是个懒虫。尽管如此，他依然深爱着他的家人们。

BriefIntroduction.en: Zombies that eat it drop suns when damaged
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吃了他的僵尸，会在受伤时掉落阳光

Introduction.en: Moon Beans turn into a sunbomb when eaten.
Introduction.zh: 月亮豆被吃掉后会变成太阳炸弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Creates 3 sunbombs across the lawn, dealing 900 damage per sunbomb

Chat.en: She and Sunflower are besties. It's just too bad their schedules make it hard for them to get together.
Chat.zh: 她和向日葵是最好的闺蜜，只是可惜她们的生物钟导致她们很难聚在一起。

BriefIntroduction.en: Turn into a sunbomb when eaten
BriefIntroduction.zh: 被吃掉后会变成太阳炸弹

Introduction.en: Pea-nuts can shoot peanuts and block zombies.
Introduction.zh: 花生抵挡僵尸，并发射花生子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots a barrage of 85 peanuts and gains a helmet for 3000 extra toughness

Chat.en: Pea-nut knows that some folks have an aversion to him. He tries to be sensitive to their concerns and give them the space they need. Still, he can't help but miss the good old days - back when he was the most popular nut around.
Chat.zh: 花生知道有些人对他挺“过敏”。他试着了解他们的顾虑，并且给予对方足够的空间。即便如此，他仍然会情不自禁地怀念以前的时光——回到那个人人爱花生的时代。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots peanuts and blocks zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 阻挡僵尸并发射花生

Introduction.en: Tangle Kelps are aquatic plants that pull the first zombie that nears them underwater.
Introduction.zh: 缠绕水草只能种在水中，僵尸靠近时，将他们拖入水底。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, on contact
Drags up to 5 random zombies in areas with water into the depths, dealing slap damage if undraggable

Chat.en: Tangle Kelp likes to go deep. He majored in philosophy. Grab a root beer with him, and he'll go on and on about Nietzsche's "Thus Spoke Zucchini" or hold forth on Kant's "Critique of Petunia Reason." It's cool and all, but sometimes you just want to keep the conversation light. Sometimes you just want to talk about the temperature of the water.
Chat.zh: 缠绕水草喜欢沉思。他主攻哲学。如果拉着他喝上一杯草根啤酒，他就开始不停地讲尼采的“查拉图斯特拉如是说”，要么就是死磕康德的“纯理性批判”，听起来的确很高大上，不过有时你只不过想聊点轻松的话题，比如水底的温度是多少。

BriefIntroduction.en: Aquatic plant that pulls a zombie underwater
BriefIntroduction.zh: 水生植物，将一名僵尸拖入水下

Introduction.en: Bowling Bulbs rolls shots that can bounce into multiple zombies. The larger the bulb, the more damage that is dealt!
Introduction.zh: 保龄泡泡滚出可以在僵尸之间来回碰撞的保龄球。保龄球越大，造成的伤害越大。

DESCRIPTION.en: larger bulbs do more damage
DESCRIPTION.zh: 越大的保龄球，造成的伤害越大

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly charges all of its bulbs, sending them bouncing across the lawn dealing 600 damage to each target with 250 splash (will not launch bulbs if no zombies are in its lane)

Chat.en: Guess which team has won the League Championship for five years running now? Team Bowling Bulb, that's who. They are on a ROLL. You and your pals think you got what it takes to stop 'em? Yeah sure. Keep dreamin, bub.
Chat.zh: 猜猜哪个队直到现在蝉联五次冠军？没错，就是保龄泡泡队。他们现在如日中天。你和你的队友以为可以有什么办法打败他们吗？呵呵，继续做梦去吧，伙计。

BriefIntroduction.en: Rolls bouncing shots that can hit multiple zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 滚出弹性的保龄球，对多只僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Guacodiles fire seeds from a distance. When attacked they will rush off the lawn biting any zombies they encounter.
Introduction.zh: 鳄梨向身前的僵尸发射种子子弹。被攻击时它们会冲出并啃咬碰到的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: plant is lost on rushing attack
DESCRIPTION.zh: 冲出时即失去这株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: can be planted on water, but will not shoot pits if so
DESCRIPTION.zh: 冲出时即失去这株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Releases 2 minature versions of itself, rushing down the lane and 70 damage per hit

Chat.en: Ask Guacodile to tell you a little bit about himself and he'll give you a wry smile. "I'm a Guacodile. I've got a bite like a bear trap. I spit rock-hard pits with a force, speed and accuracy envied by every plant on the battlefield. Heck, I've been known to walk on water. I'm pretty much the whole enchilada." Yeah, the guy is a bit of a braggart but he's good at what he does.
Chat.zh: 问起鳄梨自己的事情，他就会呵呵道：“我曾经被类似熊夹子的陷阱夹过。我总是能吐射出令全场植物妒忌的强力精准，岩石般坚硬的子弹。呵呵，人们说我能在水上漂。我非常喜欢墨西哥辣味卷。”没错，这家伙是有点点飘飘然不过他知道自己在做什么。

BriefIntroduction.en: Shoots seeds, will rush all zombies ahead of him when attacked
BriefIntroduction.zh: 发射子弹，受到攻击时跳起并冲向前方的所有僵尸

Introduction.en: Ghost Peppers haunt zombies that pass by and explode after a limited time.
Introduction.zh: 幽灵辣椒惊吓路过的僵尸，并在一段时间后爆炸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Haunts all zombies in a 4x3 area, dealing 1120 damage over 3.5s

Chat.en: You might not know it looking at her, but Ghost Pepper didn't always wear that white sheet everywhere she went. She first put it on as a lark for a Halloween party one year. Everyone else had these elaborate costumes, and she thought that it would be funny to dress like a plain ol' ghost. But she fell in love with that costume. It spoke to her. She'd found her calling.
Chat.zh: 光是看她你可能不知道，实际上幽灵辣椒并不是一直在哪都穿着她的那块白布。她有年万圣节穿着这件去参加万圣节晚会，当时其他人都是打扮得花里胡哨，只有她觉得打扮成一只平凡古板的小幽灵会很好玩。但这之后她彻底喜欢上了这种穿搭。对她来说，就像是找到了她的归宿一般。

BriefIntroduction.en: Haunts all zombies that pass by and explodes after a limited time
BriefIntroduction.zh: 惊吓路过的僵尸，并在一段时间后爆炸

Introduction.en: Sweet Potatoes attract zombies from other lanes when they are close by.
Introduction.zh: 甜薯会将相邻行接近的僵尸吸引到本行。

DESCRIPTION.en: Heals itself fully and attracts all zombies in a 6x3 area for 7.5s

Chat.en: Sweet Potato really is as sweet as she looks. Her favorite animal is the unicorn. Her favorite color is (and this is a direct quote) "all the colors of the rainbow". When she writes the letter "i", she draws a little heart where the dot belongs. Frankly, if it were anyone else, this amount of syrup would be sickening. But on her, well, it just seems right.
Chat.zh: 甜薯真的和她看上去那样甜蜜。她最喜欢的动物是独角兽，最喜欢的颜色是（据她所说）“彩虹的颜色”。当她写字母“i”时，她会不自禁在那颗圆点的位置上画颗爱心。说实话，换作是别人像她那样在食物中加糖浆调味，估计会被呛坏，但是对她来说刚刚好。

BriefIntroduction.en: Attracts zombies from other lanes when they are close
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吸引相邻行靠近的僵尸

Introduction.en: Pepper-pults lob flaming peppers at zombies and keep nearby plants warm.
Introduction.zh: 甜椒投手向僵尸投出火焰辣椒还能冰释其周围的植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Shoots several flaming hot peppers into the air, landing all over the lawn, dealing 450 damage in a 3x3 area per pepper

Chat.en: Some say Pepper-pult is a hot head. Some find his fiery disposition off-putting. But the truth is, he's just very focused and determined. He loves what he does. He appreciates everything he has. "I came from the weedy side of the lawn," Pepper-pult explains. "I worked hard to pull myself up by my roots. I'm a self-made pepper and I don't take a single thing for granted."
Chat.zh: 有人说，甜椒投手有点容易头脑发热。有些人觉得他火热的性格让人倒胃口。但事实是，他只是比较专注和执着而已。他爱他所做的事情。他感谢自己拥有的一切。 “我来自草坪的野草区，”辣椒投手解释。 “我努力扎根令自己立足。我是一个自力更生的辣椒，我认为任何事都不是理所当然的。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs flaming peppers at zombies and warms nearby plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 向僵尸投掷燃烧的甜椒子弹，冰释身边的植物

Introduction.en: Hot Dates attract zombies from lanes above and below them, and then unleash a lane of flame when they're eaten.
Introduction.zh: 热辣海枣吸引相邻行的僵尸，被啃食殆尽时焚烧一整行。

DESCRIPTION.en: unleash a lane of flame when eaten
warms nearby plants and immune to ice winds
DESCRIPTION.zh: 不会被冻结, 更快地冰释周围的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Heals itself fully and attracts all zombies to it in a 6x3 area for 7.5s

Chat.en: Hot Date's a charmer. He's polite, well-read, has lots of interesting opinions, and practices active listening. Zombies line up around the block to be incinerated by him.
Chat.zh: 热辣海枣很有魅力。他彬彬有礼，博览群书，有很多有趣的观点，并且善于倾听。僵尸们都要排着队等着被他烧死。

BriefIntroduction.en: Attracts and burns zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 吸引僵尸并焚烧

Introduction.en: Hot Potatoes melt the ice blocks they're planted on.
Introduction.zh: 烤马铃薯会将本格的冰块融化。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use
melts ice blocks and octopi

Chat.en: How does Hot Potato stay so positive and even-peeled all the time? Yoga, that's how. She never misses a class. Also, regular meditation. It's the only way she can handle the hard work of fighting zombies, day in and day out, without melting down.
Chat.zh: 烤马铃薯即使在去皮时也能活得如此积极，为什么？瑜伽，这就是答案。她从来没有错过哪怕一堂瑜伽课。此外，还有定期冥想。这是她能够面对僵尸战斗，日复一日辛勤工作而没有倒下去的唯一方法。

BriefIntroduction.en: Plant it on an ice block to melt the block
BriefIntroduction.zh: 种植在冰块上并融化这块冰块

Introduction.en: Stunions breathe a stunning cloud of gas on nearby zombies in the lane.
Introduction.zh: 眩晕洋葱向本行靠近的僵尸吐出眩晕的气体。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates when zombie is close
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，僵尸靠近时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: stuns nearby zombies
Spews gas in a 3x4 area, stunning all zombies amidst the cloud of gas

Chat.en: Oh sure, everyone knows Stunion as the battle-hardened warrior with the potent breath. But he's so much more than that. He's an accomplished pianist. He speaks five languages fluently. Heck, he's the leader of a Cub Shallots group in his spare time. Dude's got layers. Go on, peel 'em back. You'll see.
Chat.zh: 哦，当然，每个人都知道眩晕洋葱作为战士以他强大的气团在战场上驰骋多年。但他可远不止这点本事。他是一个多才多艺的钢琴家。他会说五种流利的语言。哎呀，他在业余时间还是青葱年少组织的组长。这位老兄层次很多哦。来吧，一层层剥开，你就会看到。

BriefIntroduction.en: Stuns nearby zombies in the lane
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使本行靠近的僵尸眩晕

Introduction.en: Gold Leaves create a Gold Tile on planting.
Introduction.zh: 黄金叶在种植时放置一枚黄金地砖。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
tiles instantly create 50 sun when a plant is planted on top

Chat.en: "For a small initial investment, you too can generate huge sun," says Gold Leaf. She's a firm believer in solar markets.
Chat.zh: “即使开始投入一点点,你也能收获巨大阳光”, 黄金叶说。她是太阳能市场的死忠粉丝。

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates Gold Tile on planting
BriefIntroduction.zh: 在种植时放置一枚黄金地砖

Introduction.en: A.K.E.E.s lob knockbacking seed projectiles that bounce from zombie to zombie.
Introduction.zh: AKEE 喷射出能在僵尸之间弹跳的投掷物

DESCRIPTION.en: Katapults a massive seed at the first zombie in its lane, bouncing up to 8 times and dealing 450 damage with heavy knockback per hit

Chat.en: Autonomous Katapulting Ejectomatic Emitter is actively looking for a different acronym for A.K.E.E., because let's face it, "Katapulting" is just not working.
Chat.zh: AKEE，全名为全自动（autonomous）弹射（katapulting）喷射（ejectomatic）发射器（emitter），正在寻找一组新的高级词汇首字母凑成自己的名字。因为他也很清楚自己和“弹射”毫不沾边。

BriefIntroduction.en: Lobs projectiles that bounce from zombie to zombie
BriefIntroduction.zh: 喷射出能在僵尸之间弹跳的投掷物

Introduction.en: Endurians are defensive plants that deal damage to zombies close to them.
Introduction.zh: 榴莲既可以防御，也能对靠近的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: Gains spiky metal armour for 4000 extra toughness, dealing double damage

Chat.en: "When other plants talk about me, they say I'm too gruff. They say I'm difficult to approach, that I'm afraid to let others get too close to me. Also, I smell terrible," said Endurian. But deep down inside, he knows that he's so much more than that. He's also short-tempered.
Chat.zh: “当其他植物提及我时，他们说我很暴躁。他们说我难以靠近，这使我很不情愿让别人离我太近。而且我的味道也很难闻。”榴莲说道。但在他内心深处，他很清楚自己不只是如此，他其实还是个很暴躁的家伙。

BriefIntroduction.en: Blocks off zombies and protects your other plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 防御的同时对靠近的僵尸造成伤害

Introduction.en: Toadstools gulp down 2 zombies whole, then produce sun.
Introduction.zh: 金蟾菇将僵尸整只吞下，并产出阳光。

DESCRIPTION.en: vulnerable while chewing
Quickly extends its tongue to its and adjacent lanes, swallowing up to 5 zombies and producing showers of sun

Chat.en: Toadstool just can't stand being idle. "I keep everything that I want to do on lists, and keep the lists where I can see them so that I'm always motivated!" she said. Whenever there's work to be done, she's always the first to hop to it.
Chat.zh: 金蟾菇不喜欢傻站着。“我把所有我想做的事都记在小本子上，并总把小本子放在我能看到的地方，这样我就能时刻保持动力！”她说。每当有工作需要完成，她总能第一个跳出来。

BriefIntroduction.en: Gulps down zombies whole, then produce sun
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将僵尸整只吞下，并产出阳光

Introduction.en: Lava Guavas erupt, creating a lava pool that burns zombies.
Introduction.zh: 岩浆番石榴喷发时在原地留下一滩岩浆，可以灼烧僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, on contact
erupts, damaging nearby zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 喷发时，对四周的僵尸造成伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: creates a burning lava pool in its tile
Smashes the lawn, cracking the lane and spewing slowing lava dealing 100 DPS for 10s

Chat.en: Lava Guava frowns with barely-repressed rage. He's trying to keep it in check. He's trying so hard. But one day some zombie's going to push him too far and he can't be held responsible for the consequences.
Chat.zh: 岩浆番石榴总是皱着眉头压抑着愤怒。他一直尽可能地保持冷静，他为此付出不少努力，但当僵尸对他得寸进尺时，这只僵尸就只能为他的行为付出代价了。

BriefIntroduction.en: Erupts and leaves behind a burning lava pool
BriefIntroduction.zh: 喷发并留下一滩滚烫的岩浆

Introduction.en: Phat Beets thump out damage every second.
Introduction.zh: 魔音甜菜每秒震出音波攻击僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Immune to Boombox zombies' music
Thumps out a massive beat of damage, dealing 1800 damage in a 3x3 area and 1200 in a 5x5 area

Chat.en: Phat Beet has been known to drop sick rhymes, dope grooves, and highly satisfactory jams, often within seconds of each other.
Chat.zh: 魔音甜菜拥有劲爆的节奏和韵律，还有令人沉迷的曲子，不过只有短短几秒。

BriefIntroduction.en: Thumps out damage every few seconds
BriefIntroduction.zh: 每隔一段时间发动音波攻击

SORT.zh: 400 (中等的) 和 1450（大的) 在 3x3 范围

Introduction.en: Strawburst grows a berry for small, medium or massive damage!
Introduction.zh: 爆浆草莓随着成长，提供伤害不同的爆浆莓果！

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to fire
Fully charges its berry and plops a massive fat strawberry in the middle of the lawn, exploding to deal 1800 damage in a large area

Chat.en: "Big is good," says Strawburst. "Though small's pretty choice as well. And you should never discount medium. I just like sizes, really."
Chat.zh: “越大的东西越好，”爆浆草莓说道。“尽管小一点也很精致，中等大小的也不赖，我只是喜欢琳琅满目、大大小小的东西，说实话。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Grows a berry for small, medium or huge damage
BriefIntroduction.zh: 随着成长，提供伤害不同的爆浆莓果

Introduction.en: Thyme Warps rewind time, sending zombies back where they started.
Introduction.zh: 逆时草能让时间回溯，使僵尸回退到初始状态。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
rewound zombies have restored health
DESCRIPTION.zh: 被回溯的僵尸血量会回满

Chat.en: "Possibilities other to open be to need we." Warp Thyme says, "Limited too far was time to approach unidirectional the that felt always I've."
Chat.zh: “性能可的它其受接要需们我”逆时草说，“限局常非性向单的间时得觉直一我。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Sends zombies back where they started
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将僵尸回退到他们出现的位置

Introduction.en: Sea-shrooms are short-range shooters that last for a limited time, lasting longer when placed on water.
Introduction.zh: 海蘑菇是射程较短的植物，存在时间有限，但放置在水面上时持续时间会更长。

DESCRIPTION.en: can be planted on water and land
Triggers the plantfoods of all Sea-shrooms and Puff-shrooms on the lawn, rapidly shooting 45 spores

Chat.en: Sea-shroom's celseliums have been carved with the feelings when he first met the ocean.
Chat.zh: 海蘑菇第一次见到大海时的那种感觉已经刻进了他的菌丝。

BriefIntroduction.en: Short-range shooter, lasts for a limited time but lives longer in water
BriefIntroduction.zh: 射程短，并且一段时间后消失，在水中能存活更久

Introduction.en: Garlics divert zombies into other lanes.
Introduction.zh: 大蒜把僵尸分散到其他行。

DESCRIPTION.en: Spews out a massive cloud of stinky gas, diverting all zombies in the lane and stunning them for 10s

Chat.en: Good for stenching the undead souls out of zombies, as well as giving any vampires who might accidentally wander.
Chat.zh: 对付僵尸的好法宝，同时也饶不了周围闲逛的吸血鬼。

BriefIntroduction.en: Diverts zombies into other lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 把僵尸分散到其他行

Introduction.en: Garlicloves are instant-use plants that divert zombies into other lanes when eaten.
Introduction.zh: 大蒜把僵尸分散到其他行。

DESCRIPTION.en: on being eaten
Spews out a massive cloud of stinky gas, diverting all zombies in the lane and stunning them for 5s

Chat.en: "People often mistake me as a slice of Garlic, but we're actually not related."
Chat.zh: 对付僵尸的好法宝，同时也饶不了周围闲逛的吸血鬼。

BriefIntroduction.en: Diverts zombies into other lanes
BriefIntroduction.zh: 把僵尸分散到其他行

Introduction.en: Electric Blueberries randomly electrocute zombies across the lawn every ~12s.
Introduction.zh: 闪电蓝莓每隔一段时间发射一团雷云，烧毁随机的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly creates a thunder cloud that flies to 3 random zombies, dealing massive damage

Chat.en: Electric Blueberry prides herself for being eclectic as well as electric. "I like to keep'em guessing," she says. "A zombie should always be like, 'Whoa, didn't see that coming,' when they're disintegrated."
Chat.zh: 闪电蓝莓因她的不拘一格和易怒如雷的性格而自豪。“我想让他们一直好奇着，”她说。“僵尸在被解体时总会感到吃惊：‘喔！别人都说她很弱的啊！’”

BriefIntroduction.en: Randomly electrocute zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 烧毁随机的僵尸

Introduction.en: Spore-shrooms fire spores that make zombies create new Spore-shrooms when defeated.
Introduction.zh: 孢子菇向僵尸发射能使僵尸被击败时产生孢子菇的子弹。

DESCRIPTION.en: Fires 3 massive spores that deal 1800 damage and 600 damage in a 3x3 area, infecting any zombies in that area

Chat.en: "My favorite arithmetic operation?" wonders Spore-shroom. "I guess I'd have to say, um, addition. Hang on, no... multiplication."
Chat.zh: “我最喜欢的算术方式？”孢子菇想。“我猜应该是，嗯，加法！等等，不……是乘法。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Spawns new Spore-shrooms from defeated zombies
BriefIntroduction.zh: 使僵尸被击败时能产生新的孢子菇

Introduction.en: Intensive Carrots bring eaten plants back to life.
Introduction.zh: 复活萝卜将被打败的植物复活。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
adds overhealth to revived plants (150% of base health)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 使复活的植物生命值增加（基础生命值的150%）

Chat.en: "How do I revive defeated plants?" asks Intensive Carrot. "In a word: Vitamins. Vitamins and sorcery."
Chat.zh: “猜猜我怎么让植物死而复生？”复活萝卜问道。“简言之，就是用维生素，维生素加上魔法。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Brings eaten plants back to life
BriefIntroduction.zh: 将被打败的植物复活

Introduction.en: Holly Barriers damages attackers, and can launch 3 prickly barrier leaves to knock back and damage a group of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 冬青骑士对身边的僵尸造成伤害，还能发射三株带刺的障碍来击退并伤害僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: tap to arm, tap on target tile to fire
DESCRIPTION.zh: 点击瞄准，再点击目标格子发射

DESCRIPTION.en: knocks zombies back on impact and creates a spiky leaf that damages zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 子弹砸中地面时生成带刺的障碍

DESCRIPTION.en: Instantly regrows all of its leaves and fires 3 spikey leaves with 2500 toughness across the lawn that deal 75 damage/0.8s

BriefIntroduction.en: Tap on plant, then tile, to fire damaging barriers at target tile
BriefIntroduction.zh: 点击植物，然后点击地砖，即可向目标地砖发射破坏性屏障。

Introduction.en: Caulipowers use their mental powers to hypnotize random zombies and turn them against their former friends.
Introduction.zh: 超能花菜利用他们的心灵控制能力来魅惑随机的僵尸，使之以他们的同类为敌。

DESCRIPTION.en: hovers above ground and water
Uses its telekenetic mind powers to instantly fling 5 random zombies off the lawn

BriefIntroduction.en: Periodically hypnotizes a random zombie
BriefIntroduction.zh: 周期性地催眠一个随机的僵尸。

Introduction.en: Gumnuts pop sticky gum onto zombies, pinning them in place and causing them to block other zombies behind them.
Introduction.zh: 香果胶向僵尸喷溅口香糖，把他们定在原地，并拦住其身后的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, activates when zombie is close
DESCRIPTION.zh: 一次性使用，僵尸靠近时触发

DESCRIPTION.en: stronger zombies form stronger gum (3000 + 0.25 x Zombie HP)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 更强大的僵尸会形成更强大的口香糖

DESCRIPTION.en: Pumps out a giant gum balloon, popping into 5 clumps of gum that stall zombies
constantly heals the plant directly in front of it
DESCRIPTION.zh: 会不断地治愈它正前方的植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: can heal Chard Guard's fallen leaves
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以治愈甜菜护卫掉落的叶子。

DESCRIPTION.en: heals all plants in a 3x3 area at 125 HP/s
DESCRIPTION.zh: 会在三倍速度治愈 3x3 区域内的所有植物。

Introduction.en: Reinforce-mints push all zombies back and provide a temporary boost to all Reinforce-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 防御薄荷将所有僵尸击退，并为草坪上所有防御家族植物带来强化效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
triggers plant food effects of Reinforce-Mint family plants, and boosts them for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发防御薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Enlighten-mints give a burst of sun when planted, and provide an additional temporary boost to Enlighten-mint Family plants.
Introduction.zh: 启明薄荷在种植时产生一沓阳光，并为启明家族植物带来额外的能量。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
boosts the sun production value and speed of Enlighten-Mint family plants, and boosts them for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发启明薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Winter-mints chill all zombies on the board when planted and provide a temporary boost to all Winter-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 寒冻薄荷在种植时使全场僵尸进入冷冻状态，并为所有寒冻家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
chills the entire lawn permanently and boosts Winter-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发寒冻薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Spear-mints generate a column of saws, dealing no damage but pushing zombies back and spawning slightly weaker Spikerocks on the last column and provide a temporary boost to all Spear-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 穿刺薄荷在种植时从草坪左侧产生一列锋利的圆锯，并为所有穿刺家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
spawned Spikerocks are get a weaker boost and deal less damage, they also don't drop sun when shoveled
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发穿刺薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons saws from the far left of the lawn and boosts Spear-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发穿刺薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Appease-mints fire a volley of huge peas that break into smaller peas and provide a temporary boost to all Appease-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 平射薄荷在种植时发射一打能分裂的巨型豌豆，并为所有平射家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
fires huge peas that break into smaller ones and boosts Appease-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发平射薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Enchant-mints randomly hypnotize a number of zombies and provide a temporary boost to all Enchant-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 魔法薄荷在种植时魅惑场上的几只僵尸，并为所有魔法家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
hypnotizes random zombies and boosts Enchant-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发魔法薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Ail-mints poison all zombies when planted and provide a temporary boost to all Ail-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 剧毒薄荷在种植时使所有僵尸沾上毒液，并为所有剧毒家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
poisons all the zombies on the lawn and boosts Ail-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发剧毒薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Pepper-mints set off lane-wide bursts of flame when planted and provide a temporary boost to all Pepper-mint plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 热辣薄荷在种植时在全场燃起火焰，并为所有热辣家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
sets the entire lawn ablaze and boosts Pepper-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发热辣薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Enforce-mints shrink a number of zombies when planted and provide a temporary boost to all Enforce-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 健壮薄荷在种植时缩小场上的好几个僵尸，并为所有健壮家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
shrinks a number of zombies and boosts Enforce-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发健壮薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Bombard-mints set off a number of explosions on the board and provide a temporary boost to all Bombard-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 爆裂薄荷在种植时在场上引起几发爆炸，并为所有爆裂家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
sets off a number of explosions and boosts Bombard-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发爆裂薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Conceal-mints power up all shadow plants on the lawn, drag some number of zombies to their doom, and provide an additional temporary boost to Conceal-mint Family plants.
Introduction.zh: 暗影薄荷在种植时将场上的几只僵尸拽入地下，并为所有暗影家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
drags a number of zombies into the ground and boosts Conceal-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 触发暗影薄荷植物的特殊能力并增强它们。

Introduction.en: Fila-mints do electric damage and provide a temporary boost to all Fila-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 电能薄荷在种植时电击全场的敌人，并为所有电能家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
deals electric damage to zombies and boosts Fila-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 对僵尸造成电力伤害并在短时间内增强电能薄荷植物。

Introduction.en: Contain-mints stun all zombies on the board and provide a temporary boost to all Contain-mint Family plants on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 滞缓薄荷在种植时眩晕全场的僵尸，并为所有滞缓家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
stuns every zombie on the lawn and boosts Contain-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 击晕草坪上的所有僵尸，并短时间内强化滞缓薄荷植物。

Introduction.en: Arma-mints power up all lobbing and cannon plants on the lawn, launches a barrage of stunning projectiles, and provide an additional temporary boost to Arma-mint Family plants.
Introduction.zh: 军械薄荷在种植时投射带有眩晕效果的子弹，并为所有军械家族植物带来增益效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: single use, instant
launches a barrage of stunning projectiles and boosts Arma-Mint plants for a short time
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射大量威力强大的弹幕，并短时间内强化军械薄荷植物。

Introduction.en: Shadow Peashooters are shadow plants that fire poisoning shadow peas and and shoot slowing piercing beams when powered.
Introduction.zh: 暗影豌豆属于暗影植物，得到暗影强化时能穿透整行僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: shadow peas deal 10 armour-piercing damage for 1 sec
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影豌豆造成10点穿甲伤害，持续秒。

DESCRIPTION.en: fires  poison peas and shoots piercing, slowing bolts when powered
DESCRIPTION.zh: 暗影状态下，发射穿透的、减速效果的电光。

DESCRIPTION.en: can drag zombies down into the ground when nearby
DESCRIPTION.zh: 附近时可以把僵尸拖入地下。

DESCRIPTION.en: Creates a shadow bomb depending on how many Moonflowers are on the lawn (<2 is small, 2 is medium, and 3< is big), dealing 400, 1100 and 1800 damage respectively

Introduction.en: Murkadamia Nuts are defensive shadow plants who, when powered, grow jelly murk to damage attacking zombies.
Introduction.zh: 暗影夏威夷果是一种防御型暗影植物，被暗影强化时能生成胶体，对啃食他的僵尸造成伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: damage inflicted through bites is reflected by 25%
damaged murk regrows over time (100HPS)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受损的胶体随时间修复

DESCRIPTION.en: Grants it a shield that can absorb 2500 damage

Introduction.en: Noctarines are shadow plants that explode and create clouds of damaging and slowing gas.
Introduction.zh: 樱桃炸弹会爆炸并对范围内所有僵尸造成伤害。他们会立刻爆炸，将他们种在僵尸附近。

DESCRIPTION.en: can be placed on top of other plants and boosts Shadow ones for 20 seconds (25 if powered)
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以放置在其他植物上方，并为暗影植物提供增益效果，持续 20 秒（充能后为 25 秒）。

Chat.en: For a plant churning with internal gases, Noctarine's opinions are shockingly conventional. "Jaws is a good movie," he says. Like, NO KIDDING, Noctarine!
Chat.zh: 作为一株体内翻腾着气体的植物，暗影油桃的见解却出奇地循规蹈矩。“《大白鲨》是部好电影，”他说。拜托，我认真的，我可是暗影油桃！。”

BriefIntroduction.en: Creates damaging gas cloud that boosts nearby Shadow plants
BriefIntroduction.zh: 制造有害气体云，增强附近暗影植物的生长。
